subject: Jack Smith is winding down his investigation against Donald Trump!

body:
But, a full report detailing all of Trump's crimes could be released!

**BAD NEWS:** Jack Smith is winding down his investigation and will resign as Special Counsel before Trump takes office – otherwise he knows he’d be fired.

**BUT THERE’S GOOD NEWS:** He still plans to finish his report! We could STILL get a full report detailing all of Trump’s crimes and Smith’s findings! **[_The people deserve to know the exact extent to which Trump broke the law, friend! Add your name to thank Jack Smith for his hard work »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thank_jack_smith?source=FFR_20241123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22566%2E4449941%2EmYgfzk)** | [REPUBLICANS ARE STILL MERCILESSLY ATTACKING AND DISCREDITING JACK SMITH – ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK HIM FOR HIS HARD WORK AND STAND WITH HIM AGAINST MAGA ATTACKS IN THESE FINAL WEEKS »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thank_jack_smith?source=FFR_20241123_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22566%2E4449941%2EmYgfzk)

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a5364ea43be04ffdaba172f4c9b55820&_e=_AW-N5umbvEu_Yiejk459w9YCZLmyQpVWPJ_JOS0w6ArroDnwBkvkoy14nVHX1QqM27WS2una7t0PyYjkq8dLD7mWN1JJomEg5bHraF_NfX5UWOHS01GlbB1Ku-ljxNPwNUEKsZHfNOI9IXG7KrAYnGMmORanoq_RMeUY2fSUtZlEcHVHYsqq_vac9khnMhUjXDKLQngTMVa-be5QU9sxvKb7zaUPeCd09jWHTHY22GylCNYUhLgKM0UIZrUCh6NNKSWQSbl12UGLuK6glRedBTkLqMekVYit4NAGF-jQPlSX8jOlZZG3DIUnTqiymeyUKsr59i2WfU3ccLRJ-OLeo-wZAUI2mebcec-afIjPXOzWmSLw7ilPQJbqZMro4ZMsWjKJvwoOH5CpgjrFGr-BPrPnbqfwpfG6lYGDyW0fqY%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a5364ea43be04ffdaba172f4c9b55820&_e=_AW-N5umbvEu_Yiejk459w9YCZLmyQpVWPJ_JOS0w6ArroDnwBkvkoy14nVHX1QqM27WS2una7t0PyYjkq8dLD7mWN1JJomEg5bHraF_NfX5UWOHS01GlbB1Ku-ljxNPwNUEKsZHfNOI9IXG7KrAYnGMmORanoq_RMeUY2fSUtZlEcHVHYsqq_vac9khnMhUjXDKLQngTMVa-be5QU9sxvKb7zaUPeCd09jWHTHY22GylCNYUhLgKM0UIZrUCh6NRzX8vvXAL2UxcRn0eZY75NlK0y5NlVNqeh5itDRBTgpC5pvA9yjvCV7xfJpWWCz0qiAnOnZUYL2_J94dlIdmeIej44f8mVd3MA6OYixF-rTBG-NDeI1n3Kkur6zpQN0K_MdZOuJtAGRipO8Ht-fgaAv7EhMyuBYmNWffvBUfTWQ%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a5364ea43be04ffdaba172f4c9b55820&_e=_AW-N5umbvEu_Yiejk459w9YCZLmyQpVWPJ_JOS0w6ArroDnwBkvkoy14nVHX1QqM27WS2una7t0PyYjkq8dLD7mWN1JJomEg5bHraF_NfX5UWOHS01GlbB1Ku-ljxNPwNUEKsZHfNOI9IXG7KrAYnGMmORanoq_RMeUY2fSUtZlEcHVHYsqq_vac9khnMhUjXDKLQngTMVa-be5QU9sxvKb7zaUPeCd09jWHTHY22GylCNYUhLgKM0UIZrUCh6Nb_VwDy3hFE7HfGjWTVpND7tICBVh7YgvSbiVTjWHyzPxLlVEmWdrZEu8PNOXwgn3oCo3MtCkfMW5ep7ses0phvnVOQ-qFXsfZxTiSYmAcOZ01rgeUBK2_Nvhxu5LNRwoIX0T9iXICDzYwmjtb1HL7atSyxV7uOOtIW6rvX9zEXI%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a5364ea43be04ffdaba172f4c9b55820&_e=_AW-N5umbvEu_Yiejk459w9YCZLmyQpVWPJ_JOS0w6ArroDnwBkvkoy14nVHX1QqM27WS2una7t0PyYjkq8dLD7mWN1JJomEg5bHraF_NfX5UWOHS01GlbB1Ku-ljxNPwNUEKsZHfNOI9IXG7KrAYnGMmORanoq_RMeUY2fSUtZlEcHVHYsqq_vac9khnMhUjXDKLQngTMVa-be5QU9sxvKb7zaUPeCd09jWHTHY22GylCNYUhLgKM0UIZrUCh6NL7skcKgsZmmkGp4PEYVZxPXzHG1v0BNracfSorPzfjnf34E96QrrT19UMOZFv_ErcmopWsQM-IU_vRDBBqyJNrIhas4dNk8W5MoShWdsjUdUhe3V2kfIyXQXetln6Y0MoIprZA7orvaasLALIhGMxBdEGoD4Phiqqel-avWszvY%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. **And sued me for defamation.** Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=a5364ea43be04ffdaba172f4c9b55820&_e=_AW-N5umbvEu_Yiejk459w9YCZLmyQpVWPJ_JOS0w6ArroDnwBkvkoy14nVHX1QqM27WS2una7t0PyYjkq8dLD7mWN1JJomEg5bHraF_NfX5UWOHS01GlbB1Ku-ljxNPwNUEKsZHfNOI9IXG7KrAYnGMmORanoq_RMeUY2fSUtZlEcHVHYsqq_vac9khnMhUjXDKLQngTMVa-be5QU9sxvKb7zaUPeCd09jWHTHY22GylCNYUhLgKM0UIZrUCh6NaGSM3e4GQgoFVcLor33dz_pTpquFFCqoqIkFluPSvO-TyxKpuenqoVhtCkPuYurFyNixjNAV_l4iG7wk_b00WjCc7rDBckDTN2_i3i2QHMdAXOVriNwN9nBHKl6ysVp_ydBar0BFEbBoOKHVi_z0lGMbEMkd1RQ3BlPyIrSjTbw%3D)**

We need to level with you, Peter. As you read this, Donald Trump is enacting his Project 2025 agenda, nominating his unqualified and power-hungry allies to top Cabinet positions that will threaten everything from public health to public schools. **But here’s some hopeful news:**_We can do something about it._ Grassroots momentum is what kept our movement going throughout the entire campaign, and it’s what will keep us in this fight for the four years ahead. _The hard work and preparation we need to do to protect our fundamental freedoms and win in the midterms starts right now._ But in order to hold Trump accountable and make sure him and his cronies know what they’re up against, _we need you._ **With critical decisions about our country’s future being made right now, we can’t get complacent and allow Trump’s lies to go unchecked. We have to keep up our momentum and tackle these attacks head on.** [**Peter, will you chip in $50 or any amount now to directly power our fight and make sure that we stand up to Trump’s Project 2025 agenda?**](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbYdcN4PYHewx5B3MAqS-KKtk3FfaD6ME-iZ6T5eoM_YYSg97cJQwgAvgSf4B5mDGvHAbJO9108EEEuwFQyEs4OE8Ebd7uFXlHuY6HYYloMFBw3ptDj8vn4IEXXZJNdaoWcoYjNZxN5ULrUBgssWy_VaGXq_S7G_oSue0fA9JswSlP5514vPG4rcIlXisdVBbVQQ7iqsVyWDa-XAC_9mo-PrWhrav_PcUcIJuudIwWrPHvCqFt9TLR4A2SH0FCxB1ffxtodmK6FHIUrw0u9n4eZCvMwUdkQeUkD58eERV4F2xABQg2xLO6RK3YS4w3sVUn041dr2MfTBytW532E8H8v47DynewJwgVDV3-NpaeOkbet6ds-4Be1dxuXwkFKt3SZot2MXecA4CU8wf1e3ZEY07JelZJv7STNb8d1qsmdSB_DhKeh30T3LaVGtEjUBwFcg4mfpGVctaTZSAx4kj7X-3isjTT-fmKzp199wdGsyE/4bq/8OMpUM7CSyWm2H0oBZfUiQ/h1/h001.lGNdCUMNnq-D3XQ7PTOnJTqxAza6RUXWlfuTq_99w34) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3UbYdcN4PYHewx5B3MAqS-KKtk3FfaD6ME-iZ6T5eoM_YYSg97cJQwgAvgSf4B5mDGvHAbJO9108EEEuwFQyEs4OE8Ebd7uFXlHuY6HYYloMFBw3ptDj8vn4IEXXZJNdaoWcoYjNZxN5ULrUBgssWy_VaGXq_S7G_oSue0fA9JswSlP5514vPG4rcIlXisdVBbVQQ7iqsVyWDa-XAC_9mo-PrWhrav_PcUcIJuudIwWrPHvCqFt9TLR4A2SH0FCxB1fW7SYzSiTNsE0Ua_LUR2ZgCiEyFc7F89bzJ1e68QF3y7l7-BTrzULoXhJJ0Rcr75TEnbR0uPDEQNn4ooc59VKD36QQv83jZcui3IACuCLn9_oxMafKg7dnBOS-aRCtb-Q2JInN4KbYESN8tP-vIWS-eaxxT1MAKocdBRgc8gCrEBLUr2n_AxqZDkgjJThVBf-qio4U50zAzmYpFfmLyicUxzPxoGAR_C2rwK0Ig2eA87MeVom6oFoAhzR35dd08R4/4bq/8OMpUM7CSyWm2H0oBZfUiQ/h2/h001.nEeb9ng8GTq05FBdDE_OqR1orMp4bN349DdqLXnheP0)

clean_body: | | | We need to level with you, Peter. As you read this, Donald Trump is enacting his Project 2025 agenda, nominating his unqualified and power-hungry allies to top Cabinet positions that will threaten everything from public health to public schools. But here’s some hopeful news:We can do something about it. Grassroots momentum is what kept our movement going throughout the entire campaign, and it’s what will keep us in this fight for the four years ahead. The hard work and preparation we need to do to protect our fundamental freedoms and win in the midterms starts right now. But in order to hold Trump accountable and make sure him and his cronies know what they’re up against, we need you. With critical decisions about our country’s future being made right now, we can’t get complacent and allow Trump’s lies to go unchecked. We have to keep up our momentum and tackle these attacks head on. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance, Harris-Walz HQ | | | |

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The ‘nonprofit killer’ bill passed the House with help from establishment Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, we reached out about a dangerous bill, HR 9495, that would give
the Trump administration sweeping power to shut down any nonprofit
organization it doesn’t like by accusing them of supporting terrorists
without any due process or proof.

Though it failed to pass its first vote in the House, it unfortunately
passed a second vote on Thursday with the support of 15 Democrats,
including corrupt Rep. Henry Cuellar.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241123?refcode=em20241123-36177&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36177_1203867_JP2MCi&akid=36177%2E1203867%2EJP2MCi ]Tweet from Prem Thakker: Here are the 15 Democrats who voted in favor
of HR 9495 — which would empower the Treasury Secretary to revoke
nonprofit tax status of orgs based on subjective judgement they’re
“terrorist-supporting.” Down from the 52 who supported it last week.

The good news is that the number of Democratic members who voted for this
bill drastically decreased from 52 the first time around, no doubt because
of the outpouring of public opposition from people like you.

The bad news is that this assault on our freedom of speech and right to
organize will now advance to the Senate. If passed, it will give
presidents like Donald Trump unprecedented and unchecked power to squash
dissent, especially when it comes to organizations speaking out against
Israel’s genocide and ethnic cleansing of Palestinians.

Justice Democrats is gearing up to challenge corporate, out-of-touch
Democrats like those who supported this dangerous bill. The Democratic
Party needs to clean house, and we’re recruiting progressive, working
class candidates to run and replace them in the next election.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241123?refcode=em20241123-36177&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36177_1203867_JP2MCi&akid=36177%2E1203867%2EJP2MCi ]Will you directly fuel our work to find the next generation of leaders
to run for Congress, transform the Party for the better, and fight for our
shared values?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241123?refcode=em20241123-36177&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36177_1203867_JP2MCi&akid=36177%2E1203867%2EJP2MCi ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241123-36177-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36177_1203867_JP2MCi&akid=36177%2E1203867%2EJP2MCi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36177%2E1203867%2EJP2MCi

| | Peter, it’s never been more important to fight for our shared values at every opportunity. I will work every day to build up our infrastructure here in Oregon, protect Social Security and Medicare, fight climate change, and strengthen our unions. As we close out the year and prepare for the 119th Congress, I will be consistent in my fight for Oregonians and all Americans. But it’s important for me to hear from you about what’s on your mind, too. **[Will you take a moment to let me know what your priorities are in the weeks ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97565835/513887903/-2021230837?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmNkOTEyMS0xMGFhLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIUvyvgzVfyV-prax37kB5QGXZB7cgXaubvQITcnvQQ=&emci=3a3acd25-cba9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a6cd9121-10aa-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=9636579)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97565836/513887904/-2021230837?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmNkOTEyMS0xMGFhLWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIUvyvgzVfyV-prax37kB5QGXZB7cgXaubvQITcnvQQ=&emci=3a3acd25-cba9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a6cd9121-10aa-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=9636579)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z0eq2pkgkkllr052d2ddbtjgo12aa865i6ec7o50_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5j61o72clh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z69lo18hhfh9fv34ubjl1ljntpmphas92l2h4m38_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5j61o72clh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3r2k4lvoqpbgg6vjg8mv0oq93ijq3edqbn3c8g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5j61o72clh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrpuku4s68ov35si2md1t400kpa0ccuv3sakb23o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5j61o72clh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zev83keouh30u5vk0se43v4rldv0hhecunhr26e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5j61o72clh2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjejrtphrvj2errmps8uoqm1l7cb8bariact1jc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjeof74cp55ijga9un7vmo84rbdojfavkr6diico_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze0ao91gtglrhhicu445of4t6hda9cs8ukae7rso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaa5ub4npmh8c3asqvetekj7d0b8ss6lvvb4kqro_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh2bs)
---
| |
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp70lpe3p0rknrju3aq78d5ipcgttm2fbd94e7mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cphm4ob1cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2mlsjudgk7f9jr8qsr35e1q54fs3mcsb5dq5h70_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z28svrtk8c3pra0ffsri29l3d88u1tm59ab84eb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob6chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: John Pierce
subject: BREAKING: DOJ Helped Kill Stephanie’s Babies, Now They Want Her in Prison
body:
Joe Biden’s brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez’s babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgesgihcia9c072temdkjlcomul7dt4loi3bl3do_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs2aoja8spq6hc40reegtvfvhnjh2vnpjtief6go_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5t3sckgf4u33l462g6dtpvslot5faklkcu95t48_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)**

Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

**[Patriot, please help NCLU defend Stephanie and our other innocent clients with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z92mrlgmkrv84d1fmvjho2cl6ghbbsgi3daqc1e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)**

Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

**[Patriot, PLEASE help NCLU fight back in court for our clients with your vital gift of at least a critical $25, $50, $100 or more RIGHT NOW.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmr1dml1u0p619ee5voqcff9map5902aoaksn5u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)**

Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison!

Thank you!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden 's DOJ helped kill Stephanie's babies. And now she faces 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit. **Her trial is on December 3rd.But President Trump endorses NCLU because we're beating the DOJ in court.

**[Please help NCLU defend Stephanie with your critically important gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z15ljutp74dqopu28srh9lgb2b614p0n2db0sko8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)**

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

Your America

Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1! First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal. But she refused to knuckle under. The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years! As you can imagine, this terrified her. What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health. Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd. But there's something you can do about it. I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union. Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case: We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON! Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy. In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far! And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court. NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court. The stakes couldn't be higher. Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point. There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it. Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison! Thank you! In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden 's DOJ helped kill Stephanie's babies. And now she faces 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit. Her trial is on December 3rd.But President Trump endorses NCLU because we're beating the DOJ in court. DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS. Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Riley Gaines
subject: This evil is widespread
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zupfop87fdd8219m6bf8paln3boa1qlc69dgcppg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z81fvr1slq6ebgbqrcn6856iadhdo4t52ddpd4rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1jdcba1v9g9g21on3ea9p68n8qm9dtd9fcgb57g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zplc5cpfaseksrhv5rs48olflj4i8h6bbo70id4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsoi1v3d4jdbql8t9teo3d1086a049ur3g0e9jh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlv4le4pdqs7m8rtims9dc13mgk7cmi4a2iu430g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zbn80g4b6n6q4m9tpohh3u9tn8e872d8m10g8he8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0sp0ogps3k52ujjto2tq7iheng95pcphkmtf2q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ziq8jqilf5qaorbvh997a4b6skdhqa53t5r9j180_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqj9ufg0of95p9hoon7d21qbmnsspdi37u1fmv6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztql85iu35gm5u238mnsgkht1h9qgbb6ru3cs9oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zh9l24o9q1g8hpmu9b13b7nb3v6ajjeh9reptdu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3u3bk07g5ptm4t7mn0c14nmn2q14hgfqas3bfd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zf8t9lkv23k05cdhml5rbkl3ip62tknfj7j7rlp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm4ob2cjh2bs)

PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvpmg7jfb3qlblf4i6qljm9rctltj0828mj8bfo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcj4n6i45rjf0vr73cjtvfslj3g39844l64eksn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7u3pukme59ukppb1i4bav56k0kbjrolm5clf9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z990hose19d2d3q60au8pdp5cefpd3rgr06optmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4st0eh0dk8ldpdr9dk2o8nv6d3pm3dkl216nrqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cdh62ob0s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2dem408rrktl41qeecq7qb8bv4f8g3k81p1n0ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm2oj6cdh2bs)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za5mc4udm53hhvc5hkitr4p01pm80e2ljn1jdbug_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmap32cph2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z789m6ov3h6ceate7bcrqcu0likt7kt6el4cr220_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmap32cph2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7ktjdm3783dmklqvs78k06uqcvvs3kbqi8ite8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmap32cph2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqf7ll2jlvdc0r3jd5g15penjnu0bolsgrf950to_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmap32cph2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

### Can You Retire with $1 Million Dollars?
The answer can depend on some important factors such as your retirement age, life expectancy, and the kind of lifestyle you plan to live. [Find out a few additional factors to consider](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2afq3u6osfhshf74v38g2fdeoa4m8ksc0p9sf78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cth2bs) as well as 7 tips to help save $1 million (or more) for retirement. A fiduciary financial advisor can assess your retirement plan and help you evaluate your investments, optimize a tax strategy to help lower your liability, and identify other ways to [help you achieve your retirement goals](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7j24f287o3p2t2nptg6ktlhia24f8kuf9m89m48_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cth2bs). Research suggests people who work with a financial advisor could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

Consulting a fiduciary advisor can be a great first step to helping make sure you’re on track to meet your financial goals, regardless of how much you have saved.

[Try SmartAsset's no-cost tool](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgds47oijjinptufesaceqehh7k3dcadmfiq34b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cth2bs) to get matched with up to 3 financial advisors serving your area, each legally bound to work in your best interest. It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3bvaqdve47ccqautdfq0og3rr0n21stv0npot7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmdubona762di8p02s0td54dmgedh7caqqbrkgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4g9h8p47l0feb4ulbblu0ev57bi6uk41e4cqgco_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd4cf0gc5c56f20t9ep7688h2kdbg0vmnvvjielg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfa95vhk6446fhcpj4n3erlm454ih5krgdaiu5jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcutvu1vbeldb5h9h17seo1geuvba1u17s12gl70_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkffguiv19ob28p5nneif4r4gqb4f7fqhlqp0qk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk91gf5d8kvkh47m1aea29b664g1tuma29p87vog_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr5stpcp98l380epkhg0j1qflnfajdf0q6mn1f3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zighe2lt8k54ldd1n48bq5ukbqjv6r83sb5fr92o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq9vqldic4rblu33tn20060m1nimu2r5ilna9qi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc66lero97a6772t6ihbajoo9oav1l651nilftng_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znofac1b1fbq4cpt5mv69h1ef1m73bmo2gr2qa9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhf7g9e7c8fa42khg1d8fidu0a0h11d72q0coiho_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1deoqr9fguq78dvo085ftrp7pm1nhgto94q2968_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z813ukog1gu9s9qo05cvcm99pi4ej8b4fh3antc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfh4prthag0a0tu6r9jvtscuudjo6dchqigej478_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmf9ad34u2q7i6eopq5rvtjm38ffom4u7bibp1q0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z35c9c17s305uja35mdlmhjjfaem6ap7rh55r1p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm6o35cjh2bs)

Update For America
---

clean_body: I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country. This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: | | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: John Pierce
subject: BREAKING: DOJ Helped Kill Stephanie’s Babies, Now They Want Her in Prison
body:
Joe Biden’s brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez’s babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj99j2qvc6db4uoette132gmvrifo5k2krfo21go_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9h4ubqfjf6ngduf8nvfbltcr4iban2eb25q408_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us fight for Stephanie and keep beating Joe Biden's DOJ in court!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jkvftbnbgk4jnon3u81j7ols1bl1k02s6qcn90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs)**

Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

**[Patriot, please help NCLU defend Stephanie and our other innocent clients with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z33iqsug2o1tq080sg9qf6l91in4bg3i4rjr16vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs)**

Frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

**[Patriot, PLEASE help NCLU fight back in court for our clients with your vital gift of at least a critical $25, $50, $100 or more RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk54q2ai3f3da9bjv41pansm3assl1kr2orlvjt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs)**

Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison!

Thank you!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, Joe Biden 's DOJ helped kill Stephanie's babies. And now she faces 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit. **Her trial is on December 3rd.But President Trump endorses NCLU because we're beating the DOJ in court.

**[Please help NCLU defend Stephanie with your critically important gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0uenu8kf5g178ibu8n84m1u68d9h3l80heetqog_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gmeo74c9h2bs)**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: I saved a copy of my book for you
body:
I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.

| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z66r0679hvsihigabaojhpfbp4nhgom9c4b3vlp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh8k6jg564qi6g6aioa7bc445v68ed4g0o7pffs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0l3csdt8jtdlbp7isv2p3smtegd61qf672a1pv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl5pvve639vf40mfip78j6m8mp51c1hbs4joudog_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7h3olj5btr8ciumr8h8aqvit69vgh928k35950g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmuurju77d2i20fl3anv3018fh9b8a6unci0v6jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpbc4e5bvm30d4kdn133eq1l0dd723n8jghu9emg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6914kunpdkdqtf5rrhdhcqujejjir2qtapcb4p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmkos17i14cl168pgg4bspo9sa58nu5bejfmn1c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbph077qn1kum0pee88tq7gvo3ah6hphl1rusucg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines
---
|
---
| | P.S. **[**Please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation and let me know if you can help the Center for American Liberty defeat the radical transgender movement.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhhnos1qkmmk483ui3t90d0esefbn93nvukvdvu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the _Center for American Liberty's_ work, **[when you donate $100 or more, as my personal "Thank You," I'll send you my new book,_Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ for free.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zboi5b0jha6b5304e822kotu4ml4mri40dhrc0mg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)** Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance."
---
[ **Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z20n2oou8uppghnb8uqs30b68lll8lveqg21vafg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5gm9or6c3h2bs)

| | | Friend - stop what you're doing and read this.

Just DAYS after their humiliating electoral defeat, Radical Democrats immediately launched their plot to undermine House Republicans AND Trump's entire presidency. Blue state Governors, Attorneys General, and Mayors hit the ground running to...

- _STONEWALL_ Trump's appointments
- _BLOCK_ voter ID requirements
- _UNDERMINE_ efforts to enforce immigration laws
- _CENSOR_ Conservative voices
- _SUE_ the Trump Admin if necessary

_We will need your immediate support if we 're going to fight back, pass President Trump's agenda, and save the country._

We desperately need the resources to defend our House Majority and help deliver on our mandate from the American People.

House Republicans

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
