| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9rlk9pk8une536o93mb6hpttt79fpjloiibn4ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zao3ouoq84fd17ljcfmeian6h6d4itdcrf59mjv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zera0knsna5tu4iu7qgjfob5r2nlulbca67oat0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bo945p964jr474lf4bgsu3rivodh0ptbh3mgu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo751ib5ofn7ssprqkimd2ks1ri15ngr864qk0ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoij8d4avt7kun3j37sg6t4fvk1kgnif71dpsgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfh6pat5gm267ofmb13ln36s8cobnkn9313ot1eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8id7t5ecpjs2su6nu94lkpbp5f5k1u3brodi0ho_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6sldulu4fh4b46vi14abpdtl4nq04palri3pt90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im8ob4cth2bs)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaoilf522fk98jd4q014ef14bmemos0j721eqfho_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze795i2kekhnmqukajeoftsa5kofr0cp64vvp5dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6f6ccvcks2nj7gnv2ad539a26rgheiocel9fuq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbhl5g41ibof37pj945r00p3838tm7c0sfusml78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7j998l9rn54ltidt0dlbajdjdglfq87knpj2158_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0iofm4q32aliu0s33sti27bir8u2om59kksjnm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---

clean_body: Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | Well... Times have certainly changed. | | | | Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children. | | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like Woke Baby , A is for Activist , and The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies. | | | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values. That's why we need your help to My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created As You Grow , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values. To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. A gift of $175 sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America, | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn1ngmdc0odii5gp2jhmei560n8dgtl8325s8970_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cdh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7lmhjmo8ebt07fff09e9oevi2nonirc9n6d4a78_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cdh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2kc5lh1kq4m3h85gdrvma6nl32v6pl1fp3c2uh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cdh2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpq6a8uo2ntl8mtatq1pl5ocj6tlt7r6s24mcc6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cdh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5j6jidigrijdfgdtoqb79fvcdqd287pu48pamto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5imcoj6cdh2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl0sgmg8ks4jeeme2qlgpee7rg442ktqkb5ndrrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im6o72c9h2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrif4eo2qtg5uptr8te8akb2ro4emmhl7fmc5h6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im6o72c9h2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkpddk8ltbtldp9gpbvebd76p6f7c6vf2v2rtes8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im6o72c9h2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4rkfrj16qi7r8ur7bgsvktl4ncp0pnoui5df1p0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im6o72c9h2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znbqbhm9jhefco6njbucamla10shivc09krtptk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c5im6o72c9h2bs)

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXiljURqhd9xOAT_3QRyeJECEAVaFzzkb-pYjUWS93PN8Rm6Cse9huhlRLpM2ggCsGnNUzbsqrGlNs_E5riR5roPXI7ZhqtUtBWGHLnNqDdQ2vE0wi8QbsmDSKMR3Ju7pLfPH2Vd_M-_seZhe3Mzw7E8%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXvB0Re7qo5gibEiMP_E7EbUIkbtTYihwZx9MpJkp9yiJ3LcNFoxjBJ2RO0BWo8NZWWqmVPjy3vOU0l7ZRqTgk2ySwBR-mn1ukY5ZS9tG-wB27AFadntyOmHUjEf37zsLaqIbsOMYL8n21NJ4AGBlKVY%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXj3T32EgOuenfMcMfMh5nyADLvM1e85ThLRpPfbP5i8kyfo-EW0Qryxn7laiVy8EVGeVYhgo8-Hx2MaJXam1HU2p2ekmRbfO3foCREyJgN_JTTRvVu6C2U8kXXth-BMrQ4r7quSC0wOhpsnqOLQhxyk%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXoIYCEpG-Z9ndBl5X8DBq9yWChvSvIGh3eOJEm7sBJlOWZH1ekVFMhalvyrt3QeDwh9H635-bMgpU3Vg76Wsm77KshfDy5lvg5gkF14xmYp--vu7Gn1KwPF4LuQaKISkgVUZ2YB_lPSflHKAUJ-bX_A%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXup7mKI9ynh1bmVny4dN7fD13sNlbs0j4Wu4A6ow5qUF72lLwD5e1Wmb_o9Ozn6SgveXi57IJlEH5PMcnmJ-bbsNIsDI5O2JtaT-dAn-UGXAPFBPDlhefbP4uy6epultWQXpebMhrhjgSyJ2EmDO4iE%3D)
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXhITCW1TtBw0Y3rXkecDpXthjg-hi6lttoumc287vfuX3IXb-JL-Q_rgFtY60I26QQhl2nP-Agyz4nnUg2JsgpvSb6GyhKNPMzquflxc1pvQSALhsMedjixIToUkefjVsy7lml3Cr4CsuDEr2wwRLKo%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXsoAVA9sP2O4975f48jBBsT2bLiGtrmeT5Qkci4lV9r_qIoIxVWn1wmvQqx0yXxrLxe_zxNh1_5DU9MDTThdnkO2x3ZTIQmvtHmNaJ_O4oqBljHGdSlXTblsi3Le6gBw3vSkRByqfQ_iwtMI5OGVpJY%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXtnTkj3V1oE6417SgHARmiLvKKmCGOV7aq7QsvTjv8dCUbpnVwkjwzlQK_taad2bt0nFme9FRTNQEppNHMnM-NMDkHC9cBhPfwcW7W-5dwNca5y1b04QDCt_FI186WifxyGNJW3AhF6-wm8qmHw9qTw%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXsbtUddlNXJiMY5NmxQqCAKNUK0NnqbV3xlHmpvKeAbGy32PbXDJapjZ6EQrIwJpaYFh3hn1erXncVM8nnotlxifitZPsCSuGwQFuFuxZUhE3JtYr15ZEF4eizoREY5VGUi53ATNcZ9vQUdfVMrE6hc%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a941367bc547ddb45cec04051e0e73&_e=-0Ml8-M4m29QAWsYUvp3XsPxCjXMFP3MyoCOwjvkDnuez7bkINh1bP350uqTw34-Lf9bbEE5NKdbbOHeXhmI33QzOFRoBq6agsX_yFS94SzCo4GapAT1pzlVBImVJRqMe9J2Lukg0o3mNbEy4iCLqC-2ZfCMxXKAv45cZc90DTqCWBZEwcdYdmtGonva2AZNi7bvirEiiRZNOPWwWJnhUT_OKFgVJ9D7nK_RUsArLj-1FilueynEYOZKNxh5lKzD15TY8psHrC2RH-EBmXHZ2Xc8sK8kp4hGaHaPo9Yka-x4nqVpdZm7oNfKarxIkXZJqd-IDOzWSVwBBucvRPoTXgPrejwLF-bOz3lrqCyHHH7Wl7lfElTBRg30ZCvBVX36vN6zMDCrXoiGvKKP_8uOx4aamoAWoYm0pMKJs89gvVmCgImMan5wDC8P2pu2htjZI1O1foNd1-ABGuNtlpY-k4yzdP4vRhhcqFzLifVsKL0%3D)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81c5cf8213314447b869ff9ab60d1a63&_e=5_we2NXUvErQD04zmTx3U11JTuAXLUh_Np3sWCmFV91TubuiNOTSM2pbjqXVZGVcbBZnuywxBYbeJE9fME0o2fkVeaEiEyxpV-Yj5CkxeLrp-TFncRd9tzcbTKqA6QVBCsyaaLRTERBkv98zq8ekrqk90SeaZYLfB5cl6SoInMYhIIL6S2R4Y_p4chCbIOZstUllLCEeuoR9k6MNW2t9g45EtGORPkkkGUFdHu7aut-0RCokmwAA-cvMDmnQl5d7_e2owZ-_KAl4ozxxuXjw5wUXWFqXuBYQyNsf7lEIBcJ7FD5miejdgLem76krz1wW9TA1UWw3aRBYO6hSAzPGQNoAi5X7uLxfXeL5nzkqOf8z98i1FOXNkXsRGSuHSTTx2k4YS-dLVEb66vBNivONNA%3D%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81c5cf8213314447b869ff9ab60d1a63&_e=5_we2NXUvErQD04zmTx3U11JTuAXLUh_Np3sWCmFV91TubuiNOTSM2pbjqXVZGVcbBZnuywxBYbeJE9fME0o2fkVeaEiEyxpV-Yj5CkxeLrp-TFncRd9tzcbTKqA6QVBCsyaaLRTERBkv98zq8ekrqk90SeaZYLfB5cl6SoInMYhIIL6S2R4Y_p4chCbIOZstUllLCEeuoR9k6MNW2t9g45EtGORPkkkGUFdHu7aut-0RCokmwAA-cvMDmnQl5d7UWt4PMmccPG8lRYOkDfTeZa-WOYcrwiBI1qO5sj3hwZLzU-ZsP-5tcJyv0KVRQ9ukqcHLKgCWy2Kk0Eb9u31F1PzwXcizlXl1JsJ2MTO7lglILsBfDJ31hvzP-SIaOm1JliLENlRHl2sxPGZiwHKWg%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81c5cf8213314447b869ff9ab60d1a63&_e=5_we2NXUvErQD04zmTx3U11JTuAXLUh_Np3sWCmFV91TubuiNOTSM2pbjqXVZGVcbBZnuywxBYbeJE9fME0o2fkVeaEiEyxpV-Yj5CkxeLrp-TFncRd9tzcbTKqA6QVBCsyaaLRTERBkv98zq8ekrqk90SeaZYLfB5cl6SoInMYhIIL6S2R4Y_p4chCbIOZstUllLCEeuoR9k6MNW2t9g45EtGORPkkkGUFdHu7aut-0RCokmwAA-cvMDmnQl5d71Ano1pvJOIK_ZNMwb6yEfn2YLlDOMkGuJkie5P3mxLqmqN54NZpNhdnC24T29dYz82Djt-Y0GuxKbp68YM7IWUtTNMit5Jj8EtdYEp3-2M6GlfhyFAwbZRMxd65nCgJzdCgya4gtNpeZvalGKZDtVg%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=81c5cf8213314447b869ff9ab60d1a63&_e=5_we2NXUvErQD04zmTx3U11JTuAXLUh_Np3sWCmFV91TubuiNOTSM2pbjqXVZGVcbBZnuywxBYbeJE9fME0o2fkVeaEiEyxpV-Yj5CkxeLrp-TFncRd9tzcbTKqA6QVBCsyaaLRTERBkv98zq8ekrqk90SeaZYLfB5cl6SoInMYhIIL6S2R4Y_p4chCbIOZstUllLCEeuoR9k6MNW2t9g45EtGORPkkkGUFdHu7aut-0RCokmwAA-cvMDmnQl5d77HRGiB97kx-Jiyu2V2anLDLSdY9QIs0iCnHwUiRvV3Ev9QE1N3f8O6TP6Xx0lyghA17chSfJ-1qfxeUI7x56wdIiDAYvfdJqUtmJBK45wNRm737STX1sXVlptBnhXLonndCliJyZq6z8Gh_-uD8o6Q%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b1764ecc1bf433f9be976f69224b50f&_e=tchQa5eDI-BdqpArtOko10CW8gS05qWVZe2rB9GSHWhPZ2BoES4YG5XdIczfeS1ooV4quVs5QGRY_x9-LM_d-duP_1gc6wj7NomazZ0LQPjVHe6MRruTsEsFVYYiSzU1UDLQ5X2mk4vy0I5yXNQdSSZG5-m7Dy_7GRKmb2Hd30rARmNqzKCDimnyGJfDvDQ30XpdfnMkuQrfw5YpwrsbstbDen2TarRwxeDYEWnAj8EbrMLLfCH9aL_MSQ1k-q-gLp6OZgVPAzY4uoBhxWcvYsn0OBoi6gh7dSFcj-3RNKt6OebZOocp2RiGo-9EDxhqJJN4WLP5WBXZp5nLhCIjFKwSid2ukjZUtOOJjmR4wK3YEtrP02IDBV9PZ-tRuINd)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b1764ecc1bf433f9be976f69224b50f&_e=tchQa5eDI-BdqpArtOko10CW8gS05qWVZe2rB9GSHWhPZ2BoES4YG5XdIczfeS1ooV4quVs5QGRY_x9-LM_d-duP_1gc6wj7NomazZ0LQPjVHe6MRruTsEsFVYYiSzU1UDLQ5X2mk4vy0I5yXNQdSSZG5-m7Dy_7GRKmb2Hd30rARmNqzKCDimnyGJfDvDQ30XpdfnMkuQrfw5YpwrsbstbDen2TarRwxeDYEWnAj8EO3OlNGnEl0B9XXVTxC_LQZt1qoxR8u2gP8rD6OpQihu846M9KDLqzwXztCqi2H4h5g3a1Mj4aiHB2VFwPpLE1uoTlpMPP3d_FUwY_pTVVAtGgF_WzEdjo2wK-yhRdVLf5LdxAKyhqbkxkW0t-8Ck-)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b1764ecc1bf433f9be976f69224b50f&_e=tchQa5eDI-BdqpArtOko10CW8gS05qWVZe2rB9GSHWhPZ2BoES4YG5XdIczfeS1ooV4quVs5QGRY_x9-LM_d-duP_1gc6wj7NomazZ0LQPjVHe6MRruTsEsFVYYiSzU1UDLQ5X2mk4vy0I5yXNQdSSZG5-m7Dy_7GRKmb2Hd30rARmNqzKCDimnyGJfDvDQ30XpdfnMkuQrfw5YpwrsbstbDen2TarRwxeDYEWnAj8EFysqW3KldNe5FeFEulcUUGLHbpJkA7xv-Pn6W3QcDwhskMP9mamh_nI8SmVkLhn7TbDtChAuQDefxQnrcUU9EmM9yad6B18S62Lx9M1pMZpEpuYLvuZ1arKSxEr8dtaqBsVo4w-dXeZVasWBAM8mz)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b1764ecc1bf433f9be976f69224b50f&_e=tchQa5eDI-BdqpArtOko10CW8gS05qWVZe2rB9GSHWhPZ2BoES4YG5XdIczfeS1ooV4quVs5QGRY_x9-LM_d-duP_1gc6wj7NomazZ0LQPjVHe6MRruTsEsFVYYiSzU1UDLQ5X2mk4vy0I5yXNQdSSZG5-m7Dy_7GRKmb2Hd30rARmNqzKCDimnyGJfDvDQ30XpdfnMkuQrfw5YpwrsbstbDen2TarRwxeDYEWnAj8Eh5lDNvu0uubUSfOUkueNeNSFQti91LsXUJP8YEiPfule1bG__dS9BXES2hE4YYGfHOXePji-glHK83mvhhG26e1suLNy8zWK9D5SdEIqa6i-sWTc1oxJeOTe809FrW-SCbWOcISAcmqARl_u2Lzju)

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a72648aeb682427ea03523d48ff6b08d&_e=qTV9O-bR-58a_ZKXD3lY7zDxxVN0k-OQ42D11vMz-ZQJ-_xWOPzUPjeakUo9diRU5HGctHIzZiOoj2E3ZXVNa9nOIisCejutGpSBLOh8VvEMqlU6chUl3SbpGB9TSmaiHFJVFkBAzC4sZN9SmWNV_Gnw5aE30drhinAJ7eK-Ryo5Mg9174z1YAnlaT8ugWDe_2ZanZh4EtB25I_57CFZJeeKCkW1S2Sf3lHNEc-WyBRkgYRvZJ4NeRwGeWHGu_lgKlCrWIauuLs-FdN-K1lMoQjVui_Zv5qwDQU0N8UdfBbK8RriQ53uR_ZPR9tnCOdhJGCn5wXsA2H__ihcVKkKPe9bGS2NTZiiRGFlmSLpy9C8aUqSu_nMmquIjgbw9xPa)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a72648aeb682427ea03523d48ff6b08d&_e=qTV9O-bR-58a_ZKXD3lY7zDxxVN0k-OQ42D11vMz-ZQJ-_xWOPzUPjeakUo9diRU5HGctHIzZiOoj2E3ZXVNa9nOIisCejutGpSBLOh8VvEMqlU6chUl3SbpGB9TSmaiHFJVFkBAzC4sZN9SmWNV_Gnw5aE30drhinAJ7eK-Ryo5Mg9174z1YAnlaT8ugWDe_2ZanZh4EtB25I_57CFZJeeKCkW1S2Sf3lHNEc-WyBRi3REI_ibYSeIpIrBa6z9671oe4uK2hvNbOTpbyqOuOuOIMPClGoXNiMVrPOUzIWN0P5FL7IEi0pOi7GPR0azTG-7r6ldUpjHhq8H1R_zUP1x4ucqFSUFYhcyftgIbbQHkTUWUbvqItyil4sfSH5qS)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a72648aeb682427ea03523d48ff6b08d&_e=qTV9O-bR-58a_ZKXD3lY7zDxxVN0k-OQ42D11vMz-ZQJ-_xWOPzUPjeakUo9diRU5HGctHIzZiOoj2E3ZXVNa9nOIisCejutGpSBLOh8VvEMqlU6chUl3SbpGB9TSmaiHFJVFkBAzC4sZN9SmWNV_Gnw5aE30drhinAJ7eK-Ryo5Mg9174z1YAnlaT8ugWDe_2ZanZh4EtB25I_57CFZJeeKCkW1S2Sf3lHNEc-WyBTnNW2FwBmflgP4bOV82ZFqP_8R3sPVazdBevf-WJaXayt-p6_N5l6sPSVd9JKmrm1tgC6A0-yZRhFsJG7VMvstu8TxEIHEILNwQfwQhp0sXIxoTB3EyAXDDGq9loxUXl2FVLN76VVFRPQavISgus1T)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a72648aeb682427ea03523d48ff6b08d&_e=qTV9O-bR-58a_ZKXD3lY7zDxxVN0k-OQ42D11vMz-ZQJ-_xWOPzUPjeakUo9diRU5HGctHIzZiOoj2E3ZXVNa9nOIisCejutGpSBLOh8VvEMqlU6chUl3SbpGB9TSmaiHFJVFkBAzC4sZN9SmWNV_Gnw5aE30drhinAJ7eK-Ryo5Mg9174z1YAnlaT8ugWDe_2ZanZh4EtB25I_57CFZJeeKCkW1S2Sf3lHNEc-WyBSwaOJkVFYN4Q-TxC0lqiUQ_zccklB5oLvfLMpy954w7MiU4hM0fxeheO9tzLRyBkk4sZxgcCZfA8eUvoF3qB4b1Vq7_6vhLNlf3CuJEg_mIizosP6FUZCwFI5cKcnxIScHZopjbFzkRMnIvg1Jt-5T)
---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K3DwQxJ9Gvtnoj0f2HHwY1hi-w34EdiFHIaklu0G2hCVlmLcPJpvcAunjr4vuour7u3rXGPBY_9e7mzBndWZl3AvwbDenz9bHeoA7s-KU9y1jLe8Va2C6cTb6sXETGwTv-7vkt2abpPRmYMwwQUfGhIDbMID01N-dt4OFBqfrDmO8Z_TGKO9G1puBGzGCkHd-H0lPawJdXIdHRnDZxphSDFjQ5i6eaxOmrZSUiXgQvhC-PJ_P7rLa2bgTvgDhi3G5qIvhsSqNkJX2nrJLLxZtCxHz4-2TXiMpk_Tx9km4rGVXOdbTOiJm84IvtDvAuhMxa-8xoC7ua2H1njSuBxFzzcodSofrqfqjU-YFF2kDrlsxNZgWYjXBqRSTtkWrv7hI1QTMmzsVAhHzt5getmjCZa7mF_rv46P9nWRzTpCeGAJmOZCerrvGcKXRlH9v9MfEfwYAAP__VhWpTA)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K3DwQxJ9Gvtnoj0f2HHwY1hi-w34EdiFHIaklu0G2hCVlmLcPJpvcAunjr4vuour7u3rXGPBY_9e7mzBndWZl3AvwbDenz9bHeoA7s-KU9y1jLe8Va2C6cTb6sXETGwTv-7vkt2abpPRmYMwwQUfGhIDbMID01N-dt4OFBqfrDmO8Z_TGKO9G1puBGzGCkHd-H0lPawJdXIdHRnDZxphSDFjQ5i6eaxOmrZSUiXgQvhC-PJ_P7rLa2bgTvgDhi3G5qIvhsSqNkJX2nrJLLxZtCxHz4-2TXiMpk_Tx9km4rGVXOdbTOiJm84IvtDvAuhMxa-8xoC7ua2H1njSuBxFzzcodSofrqfqjU-YFF2kDrlsxNZgWYjXBqRSTtkWrv7hI1QTMmzsVAhHzt5getmjCZa7mF_rv46P9nWRzTpCeGAJmOZCerrvGcKXRlH9v9MfEfwYAAP__VhWpTA)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K3DwQxJ9Gvtnoj0f2HHwY1hi-w34EdiFHIaklu0G2hCVlmLcPJpvcAunjr4vuour7u3rXGPBY_9e7mzBndWZl3AvwbDenz9bHeoA7s-KU9y1jLe8Va2C6cTb6sXETGwTv-7vkt2abpPRmYMwwQUfGhIDbMID01N-dt4OFBqfrDmO8Z_TGKO9G1puBGzGCkHd-H0lPawJdXIdHRnDZxphSDFjQ5i6eaxOmrZSUiXgQvhC-PJ_P7rLa2bgTvgDhi3G5qIvhsSqNkJX2nrJLLxZtCxHz4-2TXiMpk_Tx9km4rGVXOdbTOiJm84IvtDvAuhMxa-8xoC7ua2H1njSuBxFzzcodSofrqfqjU-YFF2kDrlsxNZgWYjXBqRSTtkWrv7hI1QTMmzsVAhHzt5getmjCZa7mF_rv46P9nWRzTpCeGAJmOZCerrvGcKXRlH9v9MfEfwYAAP__VhWpTA)
[ ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K3DwQxJ9Gvtnoj0f2HHwY1hi-w34EdiFHIaklu0G2hCVlmLcPJpvcAunjr4vuour7u3rXGPBY_9e7mzBndWZl3AvwbDenz9bHeoA7s-KU9y1jLe8Va2C6cTb6sXETGwTv-7vkt2abpPRmYMwwQUfGhIDbMID01N-dt4OFBqfrDmO8Z_TGKO9G1puBGzGCkHd-H0lPawJdXIdHRnDZxphSDFjQ5i6eaxOmrZSUiXgQvhC-PJ_P7rLa2bgTvgDhi3G5qIvhsSqNkJX2nrJLLxZtCxHz4-2TXiMpk_Tx9km4rGVXOdbTOiJm84IvtDvAuhMxa-8xoC7ua2H1njSuBxFzzcodSofrqfqjU-YFF2kDrlsxNZgWYjXBqRSTtkWrv7hI1QTMmzsVAhHzt5getmjCZa7mF_rv46P9nWRzTpCeGAJmOZCerrvGcKXRlH9v9MfEfwYAAP__VhWpTA)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkc-K3DwQxJ9Gvtnoj0f2HHwY1hi-w34EdiFHIaklu0G2hCVlmLcPJpvcAunjr4vuour7u3rXGPBY_9e7mzBndWZl3AvwbDenz9bHeoA7s-KU9y1jLe8Va2C6cTb6sXETGwTv-7vkt2abpPRmYMwwQUfGhIDbMID01N-dt4OFBqfrDmO8Z_TGKO9G1puBGzGCkHd-H0lPawJdXIdHRnDZxphSDFjQ5i6eaxOmrZSUiXgQvhC-PJ_P7rLa2bgTvgDhi3G5qIvhsSqNkJX2nrJLLxZtCxHz4-2TXiMpk_Tx9km4rGVXOdbTOiJm84IvtDvAuhMxa-8xoC7ua2H1njSuBxFzzcodSofrqfqjU-YFF2kDrlsxNZgWYjXBqRSTtkWrv7hI1QTMmzsVAhHzt5getmjCZa7mF_rv46P9nWRzTpCeGAJmOZCerrvGcKXRlH9v9MfEfwYAAP__VhWpTA)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n0Mw8KT8pLSYDQsFArUjQw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJZ04P0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1ST041ODMxOSZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA4RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZz_yBUNnkQwfbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n0Mw8KT8pLSYDQsFArUjQw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJZ04P0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1ST041ODMxOSZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA4RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZz_yBUNnkQwfbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n0Mw8KT8pLSYDQsFArUjQw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJZ04P0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1ST041ODMxOSZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA4RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZz_yBUNnkQwfbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n0Mw8KT8pLSYDQsFArUjQw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJZ04P0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1ST041ODMxOSZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA4RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZz_yBUNnkQwfbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

subject: Plot against President Trump’s agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
STONEWALL Trump’s appointments... BLOCK voter ID requirements... UNDERMINE efforts to enforce immigration laws... CENSOR Conservative voices... SUE the Trump Admin if necessary...

| |
---
| | | Friend - stop what you're doing and read this.

Just DAYS after their humiliating electoral defeat, Radical Democrats immediately launched their plot to undermine House Republicans AND Trump's entire presidency. Blue state Governors, Attorneys General, and Mayors hit the ground running to...

- _STONEWALL_ Trump's appointments
- _BLOCK_ voter ID requirements
- _UNDERMINE_ efforts to enforce immigration laws
- _CENSOR_ Conservative voices
- _SUE_ the Trump Admin if necessary

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03ec075460ed42058b4c147ef291df2c&_e=DJRNlHg73vazo01j0TL-nh61QQBMiWfhoJ_sRAoEYS6PN9ti74qP0e7a88A9g5DleM96INzNzRzomDMfgv3o_YnoMyjMxe8qUsHTm3kD4kpCa6GIst3UYpE7YPSg7KlGOWtgy8Vz-X4h6n5PxrmA9nIVWZdg1Cm3LwKhtCMLPYaHKFa4k2No5u18ebrx4f3zMdcS5twkVnR4carX6EOkS5d8bpijq2QXs1S56zz6_C_qW5yF_zr5uZ5tEwHb3EUhLveJQKIJ4Fmj7Z8K9DZLTxA9DDgTxJpB3Bxvp9i2nUziusI-V083ypX9rmX4RfqnRPaQR2Yoc4c1XaPmBGntCcgprBPBxbFduGNW27-WJMUC-RMWZo-GFLDi-iFRhuqQ)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03ec075460ed42058b4c147ef291df2c&_e=DJRNlHg73vazo01j0TL-nh61QQBMiWfhoJ_sRAoEYS6PN9ti74qP0e7a88A9g5DleM96INzNzRzomDMfgv3o_YnoMyjMxe8qUsHTm3kD4kpCa6GIst3UYpE7YPSg7KlGOWtgy8Vz-X4h6n5PxrmA9nIVWZdg1Cm3LwKhtCMLPYaHKFa4k2No5u18ebrx4f3zMdcS5twkVnR4carX6EOkS5d8bpijq2QXs1S56zz6_C8J2brMsJVLCm2Hl9I8Ga8cahrCQxINc8ldWmylsfo9qgpWd0H8zwMOQPqDxWR4E1qod7oOyRe4KmrQZdGUJpBSepWXCm70TfL_kFfGee8KqsqkEl2RKM89riF0SEXT3VbaVXac3M55hK6_YuI97uGu)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03ec075460ed42058b4c147ef291df2c&_e=DJRNlHg73vazo01j0TL-nh61QQBMiWfhoJ_sRAoEYS6PN9ti74qP0e7a88A9g5DleM96INzNzRzomDMfgv3o_YnoMyjMxe8qUsHTm3kD4kpCa6GIst3UYpE7YPSg7KlGOWtgy8Vz-X4h6n5PxrmA9nIVWZdg1Cm3LwKhtCMLPYaHKFa4k2No5u18ebrx4f3zMdcS5twkVnR4carX6EOkS5d8bpijq2QXs1S56zz6_C-kL4yIA0jkF-vIKrwz_LqHNJcUZwyAO7I59vhZZFp6Qajj7M0BMsbpHzj3ghv9YWB8BIxQbFPf1boxIr75JLQidX363cZgVwmUiZkLoHmtEDHILW9-aGzvRAhl8IqFHicxgzxkTEm_C73xIyGw4L8t)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a38c9d2bdeb84ec3ae946a8733920dcc&_e=joYjyz3qp_0fMXwvYHxRTiUNeGmdkRjxGXdulAu8-UcHeKboql6WQZZr1XbHN8jiFW7B5Zh-d-OYCtYh0XCVT037WDSaITyT1NJoDAuKMlhqDfkTc75Gag8GCSDXdpouZyUNyAb0j8V5psix4KfwKqnXI1lfytkV5NcKGWlLeQt33ee0YCX5UOguzPyPWXcU9uVWYEfMcKYTQ-hJKl42VM8mbrBgFo-uFUW85TFhrEUgBPNcOUO9Ode9xypM9ZSjgQYJRJbddyR4q1CAVZCYEksRbwxXks9aFs0e6cn5xCspjDQ_LN1oCheA2LJBeF_iEafmbqktuDVmr_xAhbjxOC2PaizlvUr4lfJlH5EXLclJ21pP88IhbzxiJaFxN7LY)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a38c9d2bdeb84ec3ae946a8733920dcc&_e=joYjyz3qp_0fMXwvYHxRTiUNeGmdkRjxGXdulAu8-UcHeKboql6WQZZr1XbHN8jiFW7B5Zh-d-OYCtYh0XCVT037WDSaITyT1NJoDAuKMlhqDfkTc75Gag8GCSDXdpouZyUNyAb0j8V5psix4KfwKqnXI1lfytkV5NcKGWlLeQt33ee0YCX5UOguzPyPWXcU9uVWYEfMcKYTQ-hJKl42VM8mbrBgFo-uFUW85TFhrEUjvFDZWZQxDGgxAEFi098NYilUHBsPy_q_PWRqlG7YyYN3-yQTV2RsbRUnabh8nK3EvDPJwE4SeV3bF334bMrG1N_6MIzbvwVhGdTyrSgwtfLFxOEb5P3Lrw9aRINDQe0FJLsPQoN9PUKQH3-Y_hQG)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa_Yg2CVcmFWJLFNncpXfHpdHPiLazkTM_Jxtx_6zXXgEYC0SSQaeuHPhGubaIWqwj5TkN39p-PP0Nt-G47vFMcayrqdpYY_WRJOxA5FtMwqPJvgqneax_z5_ypb-80eYjqbdZJ0DTOdNKsaY3JuAS-c%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa_MwbHM4cQraXq8Z3SvnkOXuk_ZphzTh9cQjm5OF1RBC-wrn8LtEij8rjs2qFbhzOzyL1CaMIF025XjSWWXTu_lSHSAS-dBp-SIY-AmtGRtXOI4HptEAsTPMmSi5tcv1dtqrN8OkOwYMqOujATQJArs%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa5FEVLRJeN1YeGzVjYPoe4zj2_LD5SHCgy0JMo1yXjCXfmnmiKqSgLCgl0AavKdXGYbEUT0cclGM6-xN4y7eQYrv0UGtjKpEmE8c2F1TsjmqgxZdSOp-UyamkoJVz_8QYuvVyOf_STDi6e1UmTUKjik%3D)
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa449QIU05lOYck5BEK3T1KEl5EEHKuNuYXPdcpkzliPpAxKww9f6Tov_O3haRjHgTrjlE-kkliqAN-5wAjwhX5XxvPSo-H-MR0rRgbzGIOHlerGEMDSjtokp_ecopL7mWHeEMBFXUIvixbXfkvGgjAo%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVazVZxkmTxM4kxpZaOiMdGFov5hV-TWn2NwSlpRFpmenCm3uMN27lCXtZxBT_PrSx8fDvB-KkDKMGi_PG4nTaAP9ACFtxeeqN4fOdwTCOnN4Xm_tpIr4gHR3tWfz3d8Kmp8-GpUDD-14dwlNBuAYgqsc%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa9dFKbw-tRKJY4_8XgvEn-z8X81AFP5D3BUXaE7ezdJ7C-97h7d7AmRA7IIWUrM-cs58H0BaG5ZLdBbK66iAFTx3iwAjvNyBWLjG2QxpMi5_hOpxzEGXgwXFO8VEF4LMMtEi8fC1fozJhnX8Xz5uaGc%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5fa3bfd1770e43bcbd6346f2d76edccf&_e=sVtn3pbp5Psl4gDtqvHYQOw9Wyzm9H85ZD0wLaVzcka_FHc9al44DCimuJEus6twdvN4zQDHuTZjjVXgtmOYgVCgpBfTv5wqI_TfBwRgAgYGHEyDLSW6VbRe4Q5qyyAyD_GxrMKich7HzVXfOWIt2v77b6mrCBBlYr69euTEx7Unt7bpsuGzIVc7ERhTvOU9iZDtCcJLtL8DzQ9k7W4ledxWWIFLyxQ-SvBB3knPDxDR11XE5EchvMhsM8-V0_KtKtLISab-5XO4NztlMd673dRu0UJj3W2OttKYixLWtIMltbJqPGT84ljIl-hhxWTXVGZ0hKGFbPU3VabNmEgVa6Rb7WleN_hfCQlokDkGk3MYxM9M_GMT9f0azsmpHVCmAJReOg3vQKdcwsQIuEdyTfim_tsjixg7rQ-4vqLKUEP2LANy-vtZ0MtJB3AV7YM4U6HmtLideswCxgWSXdUTSFoiICYF0NQIOpOOW_sxgWo%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-NCJ8k4naAtF0u1ZVAUbLTK7PSNBe3SDON7pd9-6-Ad66sxJBFF1M591xzkNe3Ec_Ta0nDim-o-d8B1nTQ-Sk2iPBmF5gXIab7bRZfeejvDfzrKT7ETow36JonBZYeuJLL6km7Z1yT64U-W5j6xKuws%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **[hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-GNSJYql5M_8oqD12Ikyb9aABC2iUoStlCmE4ULtMYeRdV9a5k0w1RBJxG8EUSfZYI5ZHAgW79KnBhlBUlD-cCeAddpTc1T84gG8vNy1JYrXvL0QxubK9-ujW32D114xOUMsssxWeuMMlu-p6wL6_zo%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-Gys6ZbRUpFhKbGXyMqL_-OAhXg2ODIszfIJr7VU2NARQ4EdZyNCCLMOlUfUCqz5AvtZ9IM812Lx116AYyedxgkyaQzXZ0t6M5i_XY2GYDOl_mOtVdfEzZQyMXWNDhhqKR_xg1bj3MARjopQu_yt1Wc%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-J0gskCayDkoBnDeksUSGgcGC2XOSO9TZWtJD3RB9GNjdOUb4R0eL7cf_QCQYrOanXQAjhZQosLjL8OQbbW5176YCoX8eHkaUiOr84K_fkNTxIPSzzpRhqedx_EnmIkgqHYdgo-8lg_FJc0P8GNtxEE%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-MBDP3Y5FA183qta83gCeSKhIM2fWnRfMkYDdpIRoSiaHcuK0MX_jpnol7brrkINmpQDK2O0vwbeGp9DGBIiKcQBgPbiOKCtoLryeIkBL8M6BBzUOQgvZqp1HeE74esaSJnv9qNXK4wjXasTLgP71PY%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-G1LpjPK4KM4ZIzQ-IN8UM7UZ1BikyFVUh-U5jcfD-BQWmEjXSpzcDcPbHb5UbitUE8Lw_q9dcNNNvA0V91HcuFRfhNLGddWiJGd-KWJxwNhXxT64cBB5LfYYRMhHBQNbeKx_BTcqgjKsfR1zlitmog%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-Ke7D5lAeyUGQqqeEe8tIHGA7iaGzkFE3U-rjnvADu4bZ_ioIB8G_XGR70ipJdwXthfbEYsYEr8Y6Yfys75luG748GDZhhqgxcETkNt_7wWzQr8gdBOnuhCiyxNsP-T4YDpgDNvTSOk1N_wIPu5MWSA%3D) founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9657eb19179946019537b00e7f6e19e8&_e=fZ9DqsiYyHvZoKiFN2ysgnzmWj3zumuEMd7a2KMskJrgIZlOxG2Vav2WPsKZNdAcEV47KeN1IhNKKdryXdzoTDfF_nh_--m_UO9fsB9r-u5rVXH56u3qcjMlsgtXHS-Mj1QNJbTi9Ylz_NbC2lBQhy3K1s46KENZKg2MM_Y_QDY5a5lTBcoQJjN-O6cNp3anjTxkrgSkYHjNlO5nKh45P7PdfdTfNrIlhikTDOsxLHiadi-1zJx6hTfCIxVjNr6ZYoIXZz6ZTreyTYWXEQdnzY8MENfqCt2DylGvJvWukta2LGwxAgDigYdUpLwX1DWkJU36_qBCzFClZOBThA3A-MDstRyna5I7xOknUk7idBUPTM0_aqP_jNINCZuRh4pl6hxJ9_hQfmPNpYaj0YZxkqClrQ3fI5Vy_E45EiDK6nxuwy6W6hTfYh8RZUNy9NtWJTSf9wQPoikx42Odk1fVnMIrwTpjq6oX89Tmjw1AWD0%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A0kMDt-2d5ShmqkUB6Pu8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJatSP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNFcDc3BjQgpnP0YTQ2eZxxJfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A0kMDt-2d5ShmqkUB6Pu8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJatSP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNFcDc3BjQgpnP0YTQ2eZxxJfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A0kMDt-2d5ShmqkUB6Pu8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJatSP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNFcDc3BjQgpnP0YTQ2eZxxJfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A0kMDt-2d5ShmqkUB6Pu8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpJatSP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEyNFcDc3BjQgpnP0YTQ2eZxxJfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: History Facts
subject: This tree was an ancient Roman victory symbol
body:
If there’s one thing ancient Rome is known for, it’s victory. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68c70mxn36f4pv17jwoo40b7m17j4u2oipsg1e4oko8ra5rpkvjuekkal3w32fz71rp99lwfvf9ua2q9s1qp0sqjqiamztzf0v01ngg3up7wzc2s3hjx3uo195pshce0t4z5e90u5dyqc4v1u&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Palm trees were a symbol of victory in ancient Rome.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I f there’s one thing ancient Rome is known for, it’s victory. First as a republic and then as an empire, Rome ruled the Mediterranean thanks to an impressive military winning streak. Centuries of overwhelming victories (with a few notable losses in the mix) eventually stretched Rome’s reach from the British Isles to the Middle East. Romans often marked these achievements with celebrations festooned with fronds from a date palm (_Phoenix dactylifera_). In fact, the palm trees (which, fun fact, are not actually trees) were so closely associated with victory, the Latin word “[palma](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) _”_ is essentially a metonym for the word “victory.” In the Roman Republic (509 BCE to 27 BCE), victorious military leaders wore tunics known as “[tunica palmata](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” during triumphs (massive military parades). Palms weren’t only a martial symbol; they were also given to victorious athletes, and Roman lawyers were known to affix palm fronds to their front doors when they won a case in the forum.
---
Historical evidence suggests palms were first associated with athletic victory in ancient Greece, and became incorporated into Roman culture around 293 BCE. Palms can be spotted in a variety of Roman art, pottery, and coinage, and were also an early symbol of Christianity, which originally developed within Rome’s borders. Similar to its association with victory, the plant was an emblem for martyrdom, which was perceived as victory over sin and death in the early Christian faith. In fact, some 2,000 years later, the religion still celebrates Palm Sunday to mark Jesus’ entry into Jerusalem days before his crucifixion, viewed by some as the ultimate victory over death.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj4ryklyqb58t0io3cqpdma07bb3kxg43nhl8897s5ygr7edzpilnalb4hldtleqt91qkxfa9khd0acfe5g1fmkylqr5bsmxh3pnx4msi0zbpd58d5mzc3q38ntx8to36cndk9rtiu78ehaxw9bjb3tfr6ucbdgsr88ofktzhh22h67z8nja6mwidk2oelnyjn0zhf5vbmkyvlgtiepm0lkaygir7jtlx3cm06gsg21bhv3tm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

| Specimens of _Hyophorbe amaricaulis_ , the world’s loneliest palm
