| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## The date palm played a major role in early human civilization.
With its large fronds providing much-needed shade from the desert heat, and its energy-packed fruit delivering vital calories for travelers, the date palm was a vital plant for the expansion of early human civilization in the Middle East and North Africa. When humans began transitioning from a hunter-gatherer society to a farm-based one some 11,000 years ago, date palms were [one of the first plants to be cultivated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) throughout the Arabian Peninsula. The plant can withstand the hot and dry conditions of these regions, thrive in saline soils, and _still_ produce sugary fruit that can be easily stored for long stretches at a time. [For centuries, artisans](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) have weaved baskets using the date palm’s leaflets, and crafted structures and tools from its wood. Thanks to its importance, the date palm developed strong cultural and religious significance as well, and is mentioned [around two dozen times in the Quran](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sngf9e&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!

clean_body: If there’s one thing ancient Rome is known for, it’s victory. | I f there’s one thing ancient Rome is known for, it’s victory. First as a republic and then as an empire, Rome ruled the Mediterranean thanks to an impressive military winning streak. Centuries of overwhelming victories (with a few notable losses in the mix) eventually stretched Rome’s reach from the British Isles to the Middle East. Romans often marked these achievements with celebrations festooned with fronds from a date palm (Phoenix dactylifera). In fact, the palm trees (which, fun fact, are not actually trees) were so closely associated with victory, the Latin word “ ” is essentially a metonym for the word “victory.” In the Roman Republic (509 BCE to 27 BCE), victorious military leaders wore tunics known as “” during triumphs (massive military parades). Palms weren’t only a martial symbol; they were also given to victorious athletes, and Roman lawyers were known to affix palm fronds to their front doors when they won a case in the forum. Historical evidence suggests palms were first associated with athletic victory in ancient Greece, and became incorporated into Roman culture around 293 BCE. Palms can be spotted in a variety of Roman art, pottery, and coinage, and were also an early symbol of Christianity, which originally developed within Rome’s borders. Similar to its association with victory, the plant was an emblem for martyrdom, which was perceived as victory over sin and death in the early Christian faith. In fact, some 2,000 years later, the religion still celebrates Palm Sunday to mark Jesus’ entry into Jerusalem days before his crucifixion, viewed by some as the ultimate victory over death. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Estimated number of palm species throughout the world 2,500 | | Years ago palm trees entered the fossil record (during the Cretaceous Period) 80 million | Years ago palm trees entered the fossil record (during the Cretaceous Period) 80 million | | Estimated max height (in feet) of the wax palm, the world’s tallest palm tree 200 | | Specimens of Hyophorbe amaricaulis , the world’s loneliest palm 1 | Specimens of Hyophorbe amaricaulis , the world’s loneliest palm 1 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The date palm played a major role in early human civilization. With its large fronds providing much-needed shade from the desert heat, and its energy-packed fruit delivering vital calories for travelers, the date palm was a vital plant for the expansion of early human civilization in the Middle East and North Africa. When humans began transitioning from a hunter-gatherer society to a farm-based one some 11,000 years ago, date palms were throughout the Arabian Peninsula. The plant can withstand the hot and dry conditions of these regions, thrive in saline soils, and still produce sugary fruit that can be easily stored for long stretches at a time. have weaved baskets using the date palm’s leaflets, and crafted structures and tools from its wood. Thanks to its importance, the date palm developed strong cultural and religious significance as well, and is mentioned . ### Can You Retire with $1 Million Dollars?
The answer can depend on some important factors such as your retirement age, life expectancy, and the kind of lifestyle you plan to live. [Find out a few additional factors to consider](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3de2287c179c48aea69f841293971bde&_e=jFvmZj0vnrCQpV8JVf30QRj21cu82hgesjqN_JwLkL1WuYjJkEGJ80rTj4mh2ZjIE5mi3E_96PY3GJgbxCC9Bf6-dvQ9A3A5kF51D2kaJbeSgDnuEoIMduTUPRwBU663-w61nFYeMzzaomDShpNHy-XK6zEtFww9rpnfCRU_cFtpNrn2HI_Kr354dU0LCDDnNuTiX0bIcrgFEyYghjBZJAh19cVShwbknQy19N5qZ_UlFefS6UK35Iruql5-uuLcSemc7iTk8GJsilw3FiR_mCwHND-oQc1rf6Ktz6Qg7k3iWolcJKQMl3wxkR2-TXRG_hB9EWqO6EgCOO-gy810OkGhYPsGbfHU_3M15qYS184XHfvA56V1lQVjB2M4D2roQws0TnYRnoQtKRI1trZVuJnS4XPsiRjt8thckbYXhALSVM6I-7BhiVCUSgwIgbujttbgNPPasWSCS3azcv56Yg%3D%3D) as well as 7 tips to help save $1 million (or more) for retirement. Joe Biden's brutal Department of Justice helped kill Stephanie Baez's babies ... and now they want to throw her in prison.

Let me tell you, Stephanie is a happy, beautiful young woman you'd want as your friend or next door neighbor.

All she wanted was to start a family, and help heal sick people. She applied to medical school to make that dream come true.

Like many other patriots, Stephanie peacefully protested outside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021.

And like many other patriots, she peacefully entered the Capitol for just a few minutes.

She wasn't violent. She didn't destroy any property.

**Stephanie peacefully took a stand for fair, honest elections. But Joe Biden 's DOJ went after her like she was Public Enemy #1!**

First, they charged her with four misdemeanors. And they turned up the pressure to force her into pleading guilty and taking a plea deal.

But she refused to knuckle under.

**The DOJ was outraged. So they charged Stephanie with a felony that could put her in prison for 20 years!**

As you can imagine, this terrified her.

What's more, the brutal stress of facing 20 years in prison for a crime she didn't commit destroyed her health.

**Since 2022, Stephanie has endured 10 surgeries. She lost two of her babies in miscarriages. And now she faces a vicious show trial on December 3 rd.**

But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 prisoners. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated 23 charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while we're excited about our hard won victories, we know Joe Biden and his lawless DOJ are pulling out all the stops to railroad Stephanie and other innocent Americans we're defending in court.

**NCLU is fighting for them because they deserve a strong defense, and because Joe Biden will turn his DOJ and FBI loose on you and me, our families, and other patriots if we don 't defeat them in court.**

The stakes couldn't be higher.

body:
I’m excited to serve as our next U.S. senator and fight for conservative principles and Ohio values, but I need your help to determine what issues you most want me to fight for. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_dejokhFznE3WB4KXJfNmdjMbW842W5OeIUqPjcIsJq93Vz7UoWZCcgoKLGPHRZoVrxdsyrG5mCNH-Aj2T2pUXweJTIWERzLBUu2hnMTncEmYyS_FgL7yBN8dWPQ-uLH8VSEqSc06DZ9pveSIUqLHrY7w%3D%3D)

Peter - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_deff3bxXaLI4POPEpys5tQzUjf4jfCi8G9uyyD1ZXpYb8FeaJSO6PHpHPmj4IDheTyYSmRpXEhw4Y4hutk2dy8of643RKfqSiUnqIBYnwQQWGNRtz4qWb8Y2dIUD5cZUOJdbB8qYBsCDgpjUbJb5Y-yw%3D%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_deJ6mL5MV5LfcgOl_wFdRo-QXyZ0UxOK8ODXA2SPYOU2eFu3cl_vKjJ5ZuuuaHiVFJjdXrBkGaqpSC6u3aRxB1GCs-RldyL7Pskl7pRH66XqdAWKBkvh6e69fPxFKdAXR02mBLDa8jdke7s9bqAv4-Ug%3D%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

[**Please take a few moments today to complete your Top Issues Survey.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_deFDPnYeIS1PleQEDp3Uk8efc9_iiMtYYlLQkVX5Gw3i5cjuvNRU-YgpZ4vxXrRLLtLy-kzf0u8TFsz2f1VVBq__8lpEQ8ujPUM_9nzEf_MJq1FVpd-E4SH3Ops0gFui2MBulNvRnAVrQp0pCUVcxVlg%3D%3D) I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win.

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_deGQIl4buTcPsRDWFT3_6XypjqZmHc2LFe2o40NO2cmxZoUQVfPUwNuAjpRPyyIu0aenqL_KdpnH2PZ4o4GbF5gUdxd8jIET-pY1z3z5G-lOXQW9OvRvclGI1L0QVJAxhoq1paTw3WjC4pWMLH8Ssv6A%3D%3D)
We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats.

We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans.

We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency.

[**Please complete your survey before you click away from this email.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1df982bbed2f4490acd33786f811a263&_e=LJp1p1A5hoilVbYdFGgC4H5x5FswhkJTJiI3GLC2etf8cIOhoqEWkvqfCc4trIvdMMQMCmVROdNzgCSRtbvwegT1df2E47Z8fkG5UL_Cs7C_HLpsUaeOHO6vkfH2XZca_1k8uUKVnNzmTip2-5oYKjX-0L3QYfe6StPXVpx9uBq2S1EQOzNhDE3_mNowOyyQeVNtL8kkVnBuojsLXJ-tCjdRprzH6Usr7-nF1KLj6_EAehRZPYet0JGLLTSIO7keyL9NWz78yegm494qCTtP63ZdLIIk1qrYgP3uYktZ-q4NbM2fWYnhtxh6nWC5q_deFr4V4z2qNjcGPDVdKxiKDubFQeKugeYqTjq_uQuW1U1ooQ425rvbwSXG9H3UzVuxt-3CjZOCZMwiruEkljhmqgSwh-l9W2oZRIlhpAV5mDuK_BFyXCHIsMNzK2QGerknOAggjOCISTH7mC4qAG182A%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Bernie Moreno
Senator-elect (R-OH)

Peter - Let me introduce myself. My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans! First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate! We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values. We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration. So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this which will only take a few moments to complete. We hope to receive 700 survey responses to ourTop Issues Survey before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress. We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January. I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win. We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats. We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans. We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency. Thank you, Bernie Moreno Senator-elect (R-OH) If you want to help Republicans, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but . I’m excited to serve as our next U.S. senator and fight for conservative principles and Ohio values, but I need your help to determine what issues you most want me to fight for.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Election woes signal 2026 trouble ahead
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5da8128803&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Guy Ciarrocchi: Democrats’ election-denial in Pennsylvania is the opening salvo of the 2026 campaign](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6c72f76d94&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Tragically, Bob Casey’s career will be remembered as that of just another Democrat partisan politician so addicted to power and blindly loyal to his party that he destroyed his “[moderate, bipartisan” veil](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6ce9ae232c&e=b7b3eddce2). He’s been a candidate since 1994. He knows that he can not win. Yet, he continues to allow himself to serve as a pawn for his party. Conservatives must realize what’s really happening in this protracted count and the likely “re-count.” It’s not about Bob Casey. Both Casey and the folks pulling the strings know Dave McCormick won. This is actually a battle about the future — making it easier to ballot-harvest and to “bend the rules” or cheat in elections yet to come. **Why It Matters.** Democratic activists are pressuring county commissioners and are now pressuring judges to ignore the courts and the clearly written laws of Pennsylvania. They’re working to get any change, any “loosening” of the law. Not to advance Casey’s election; he’s lost and everyone involved knows it. It’s to help Democrat ballot-harvesters in 2026. More shocking than partisan, hack-attorneys making these arguments is that some Democratic county commissioners are counting these ballots, rejecting their own attorneys’ counsel. The most infamous is the Chair of the Bucks County Commissioners, Diane Marseglia. During a live broadcast hearing, she admitted that the courts had ruled that the ballots are invalid, but[ she was going to defy the law and vote to approve them anyway](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f1dc53dd95&e=b7b3eddce2). This is brazen election interference — and election denial — and lawbreaking all at once. Thankfully, the courts have ruled to disallow the illicit ballots in the official count. Don’t be fooled when “regular guy” Senator John Fetterman says: what’s the big deal, “it’s only 155 ballots” in Bucks County. (He’s admitting that Casey lost. It’s as if he’s saying, “C’mon, it’s just a few ballots. Who cares?”) Fetterman knows this is about 2026.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=56d03e7966&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Outraged Bucks residents want Ellis-Marseglia and Harvie gone](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6be8cf13f4&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Bradley Vasoli_
Pennsylvania Senator Bob Casey’s struggle to remain in office, and two Bucks County Commissioners’ effort to help him by counting improper votes, are kaput. But nearly 100 area residents flooded into the county courthouse Wednesday to herald a new, related battle to get Democrats Diane Ellis-Marseglia and Bob Harvie off the county’s Board of Commissioners.

Many urged the two to resign but, failing that, would like to see them impeached, prosecuted, or, three years hence, electorally defeated. The commissioners’ adversaries say Ellis-Marseglia and Harvie acted lawlessly in an attempt to count hundreds of disallowed ballots.

In fact, on November 12, Ellis-Marseglia said the same herself.

“We all know that precedent by a court doesn’t matter anymore in this country and people violate laws any time they want,” she said. “So for me, if I violate this law, it’s because I want a court to pay attention to it. There is nothing more important than counting votes.”

**Why It Matters**. Jamie Cohen Walker, a Central Bucks School District mother who has fought the county in court for transparency on Bucks’s restrictive 2020 Covid-related health guidance, said Ellis-Marseglia’s behavior typifies her tendency to be opaque and heavy-handed.

“She doesn’t want people to read her words,” Walker said. “So when Commissioner Marseglia says the precedent of the court ‘doesn’t matter anymore in this county [sic]’ and “people violate laws any time they want,” she is speaking about herself and her own action. And she will do this again if she is given the opportunity to.”

Several other orators urged Ellis-Marseglia and Harvie to resign, while activist Skip Salvesen professed a desire to impeach the officials, something that [can only be done](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=837293123d&e=b7b3eddce2) by the Pennsylvania General Assembly. Insofar as Democrats control the state House of Representatives, such a project would have no practical chance of succeeding.

**Quotable**. “This is a travesty that we have to be here today to make sure that the law is followed,” Bucks County Republican Committee Chair Pat Poprik lamented.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=065b6b6568&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Activists’ ballot-application challenges fall apart](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=48744b7a57&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: First-world diets](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8c63fb3eaa&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: January 6 graphic novel sent to some local school districts, with more on the way](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=caa0974383&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Low-achieving Pennsylvania schools failing to tell parents about school choice funds](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4d55063b7f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Drug addicts are more to be pitied than censured](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e16bec482d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Three school districts forced to file suit against the Pennsylvania School Boards Association](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=272d7f4797&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. PA Pollsters' 2024 Recap**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb46b738d6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| Dive into Pennsylvania’s pivotal role in the 2024 election with two top pollsters as they **unpack the numbers, trends, and surprises** that shaped the outcome.

>From voter turnout to shifting coalitions, this insightful recap reveals what drove the decisions of Keystone State voters.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
The election post-mortems continue to roll in, and [this one from Noah Rothman at _National Review_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0bee3d372a&e=b7b3eddce2) is worth reading. How did the Democrats blow it? “It wasn’t one thing,” Rothman says, “it was everything.” Ignoring economists’ warnings about inflation, baffling foreign policy choices, and a dangerous misreading of the 2022 midterm results were some — but not all — of the reasons the incumbent party fumbled away a race that they could have had a decent chance of winning. “So, what was it that did the Democrats in? Everything. All of it.” A depressing read if you’re a Harris fan, delightful if you’re not, and informative either way.****
---
|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. Despite the setback our movement faced this month, our work must continue to build the country and future we want. We have upcoming special elections we're fighting to win – take a look: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Despite the setback our movement faced last week, our work must continue to build the country and future we want.** State Democrats will be the last line of defense against a second Trump presidency, and as we await a final tally in some of our most competitive states and prepare for potential recounts, Democrats are already gearing up for special elections – take a look: | ****State** ** | ****District** **
---|---
Virginia
| SD-10
Virginia
| SD-32
Virginia
| HD-26
Delaware
| SD-1
Delaware
| SD-5
Louisiana
| SD-14
Louisiana
| SD-23
Oklahoma
| SD-8
**Every special election marks a chance to defend or expand Democratic power in state legislatures, and with Republicans taking power at the federal level, we need to seize every opportunity to fight back.**
[Before our November deadline, we’re counting on this grassroots team to step up and help continue our fight to elect state Democrats nationwide. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: that New York Times piece
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, a recent
opinion piece in the New York Times claims that the Democratic Party’s
problem is with progressive groups like Justice Democrats rather than
corporate, right-wing super PACs like AIPAC.

We can’t say we’re surprised. This op-ed is yet another attempt to point
fingers at the left after the Democratic Party failed to stop a second
Trump presidency by moving to the right.

The piece blames people-powered, grassroots groups like us and our friends
at Sunrise Movement and Working Families Party for holding Democratic
candidates accountable to our values of justice and human rights,
ridiculously blaming our push for criminal justice reform and
compassionate immigration reform for the Party’s losses this November.

As AOC pointed out, the op-ed completely fails to mention AIPAC, despite
the pro-Israel lobby group using tens of millions of dollars from its MAGA
billionaire donors to spend more than ever before against two Democratic
incumbents this cycle:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241124?refcode=em20241124-36178&refcode2=36178_1203867_7kjylF&akid=36178%2E1203867%2E7kjylF ]Tweet by AOC: If people want to talk about members of Congress being
overly influenced by a special interest group pushing a wildly unpopular
agenda that pushes voters away from Democrats then they should be
discussing AIPAC

Our progressive movement won’t be lectured by the same Democratic
establishment that has prioritized corporate interests and high-dollar
donors at the expense of the working class people of this country who are
tired of the status quo.

It’s time for the Democratic Party to clean house and for the
corporate-backed, consultant class in power to step aside and make way for
bold, new leadership.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241124?refcode=em20241124-36178&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36178_1203867_7kjylF&akid=36178%2E1203867%2E7kjylF ]If you agree, make a grassroots contribution of $5 or
whatever you can to fund our efforts to recruit the next generation of
Justice Democrats for Congress in 2026 so we can transform the Democratic
Party from the ground up →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241124?refcode=em20241124-36178&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36178_1203867_7kjylF&akid=36178%2E1203867%2E7kjylF ]Contribute $5

The number of working class, progressive candidates we can find and
support to run depends directly on how much money we raise from emails
like this one, so thanks for anything you can give to support our fight.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241124-36178-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36178_1203867_7kjylF&akid=36178%2E1203867%2E7kjylF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36178%2E1203867%2E7kjylF

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

But his choice for an anti-vaccine and science nominee has us most shocked. That's why we need to know from Newington Democrats: Do you agree that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. should be Secretary of Health and Human Services? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T710ab8a2-1aec-4373-aee9-821d93823bbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

USO Supporter,
As Thanksgiving approaches, let's all take a moment to thank those who sacrifice so much to protect our country and our way of life.
**This Thanksgiving, we 've set a goal to reach 100,000 signatures via email and text on our Thanksgiving card for service members deployed around the world before Wednesday at midnight: [Will you join thousands of other military supporters and thank our heroes before our goal deadline?](https://links.e.uso.)**
Thank you for showing your gratitude to our service members this Thanksgiving.
[THANK OUR HEROES](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Even when their dedication doesn't make headlines, the people in our military are making sacrifices every single day to serve our country. They're deployed across the world right now -- from the cold and remote Aleutian Islands of Alaska near the Russian border to the deserts of the Middle East.
Wherever our heroes are stationed, your gratitude brings them a piece of home. It's a reminder that we're all thinking of them -- especially during holidays like Thanksgiving, when home and family feel particularly far away.
**So please, don 't miss your chance to show our heroes they're not forgotten. [Sign the Thanksgiving card to share your thanks for our service members now!](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68Qe_N~af6/OER4SWhCM3BEWUlDU1p3VnB2Q25lVklndDB1eFRrTWtRMHlzRTRIWnJUc0ZVQWpCTnE0TGpEeXMzSnZydTVRbllOaUpYODlLOTlxb2ZRT015ck10RVRUR1g3TmtJaU0vbURwRTQ2MVYyQ1U9S0/Q0pBWmQ4ZDBydjhMTy9sL1VmVEllaUcrQzE4MS9MYm8yUGhzQUpTbk1wVm5VZURpSUU3QkFFS0NQNlJqeGoxWDdBMkJCSmowbFZuY0JZNTZKbmMrbUxJdHFWK09DUUdmS0)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for your journey to heaven?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWehQsXWN1

I often hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?"

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWehQsXWN1

Hello
Friend,

I often
hear the question, "What will we do in heaven?" Many imagine
heaven as a place where we sit around on clouds, strumming harps.
But nothing could be further from the truth.

The Bible
gives us glimpses of a heaven filled with purpose and activity.
Revelation 22:3 says, "His servants will serve Him." We will have
meaningful work, free from the frustration we often face here on
earth. There will be no more exhaustion or stress, only joy, as
we serve the Lord.

Heaven
will also be a place of joyful worship. Revelation 5:13 gives us
a picture of all creation joining together to sing praises to the
Lamb who was slain. Can you imagine what it will be like to be
part of that heavenly choir?

In A
Place Called Heaven, I explore 10 surprising truths about your
eternal home, pointing to what the Bible tells us about our
eternal home.

What
Difference Does a Future Heaven Make in My Life Today?
Is
Heaven a Real Place or Is It a State of Mind?
Have
Some People Already Visited Heaven?
Do
Christians Immediately Go to Heaven When They Die?
What
Will We Do in Heaven?
Do
People in Heaven Know What is Happening on Earth?
Will
We Know One Another in Heaven?
Will
Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
Who
Will Be in Heaven?
How
Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?

This book
offers hope, direction, and clarity about what awaits those who
follow Jesus Christ.

I'd love
to send you a copy as a thank-you for your generous gift of $25
or more to Pathway to Victory. Your support helps us continue to
pierce the darkness of this world by sharing the light of God's
Word with many who desperately need hope.

Click
here to donate and receive your copy:
https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1

I hope
this book creates in you excitement and anticipation for the
eternal joy and purpose that awaits us in heaven.

God bless
you,
Dr.
Robert Jeffress

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: I never imagined this would happen
body:
Trump, Elon, & The Bee| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H4SkcR4tXEU0oXtESFhkmNU-6Fa1h0eigxiK9H6pexxg1QURPc2GYBRrqywIa_3mBJoxTIso7xgrX5QmKfHhcuwHLGH3IS_qkvbRad_tEAM02p8WK8sFd_FDs_F1iVoGEFCmdYJbuZ5IO-UzY7pP12ow%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Peter, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. For years, the left has used the liberal "news" media to spread their woke agenda, but it was largely behind closed doors. **That all changed when Twitter silenced The Babylon Bee for telling a joke.** The absurdity of a tech giant deplatforming a satirical site woke a sleeping giant.**_Enter Elon Musk._** Elon purchased Twitter and joined The Babylon Bee in starting a revolution that catapulted free speech to the election's frontlines.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H4MkM-zAOhuHbT1U8y6ypSq3H6EgQrssZ6bpWGmWn3cWl7Spvsxon5ioZ82Pg_UKgn3S47wXy_KoiqWuIRkbXMCfxcyvx8N3rmp8avjMn0kh6tdOlY4H16zo0N56eL2lsj2f6ARgytgPEFPs50S-PA1g%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H4S9R-ooVpSU1yhQiEU1nqkNoDGkE58hmFqjyRBwK_-yUEroyDJV4reUhQLsjr2zoJ80uMq1xyrq8ZL6JRqO3OENlNSn8zMNA_NfRkua-1it6fXgIjp_dw4via84XWcniAFd6E3uL32ZASTHjkbRDH9A%3D%3D)
---
_But, before millions gave censorship the middle finger at the polls,**it was our subscribers who stood strong against the left 's suppression of thought.**_**Without our Babylon Bee subscribers, I firmly believe that FREE SPEECH wouldn 't have become such a major issue this election.** **[If you appreciate humor, I hope you'll subscribe to The Babylon Bee and join this growing revolution for truth, debate, and the free exchange of ideas.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H46WVat_unle1rR_ZDm4p5VeC-fk_OkX5faBgzQM60u_kADolOOQBMyHlzWtRYvoPVhOQBYMIYZds5ra8M55AnPRLnpspxPT3IcSincVG3pVRMEFIR67y2deahjU8-t6fwGp7s_Qi9wltCHOe73j04vQ%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H4evH91jjoGZ1vtgVl4Om8Usepnojnl69xmq7DOXVgOFjd0sTZ2T8-ZLw74yTIyvY8gMrQ6gm2lCZAGVurtrE2Bu5slhbc7LU3N4TjIf0chp86HuhrIRhwcmCTmWuZvhVJGnujlz8XGPN1xPkfTzKfsw%3D%3D)
---
The left ignorantly believes that our subscribers -- Americans who like to laugh at the absurdity of our world -- are _" fringe."_ President Trump's landslide victory proves that there are **MILLIONS of people just like our subscribers** -- including unlikely Republican voters like Elon Musk and Joe Rogan -- who believe that free speech is a critical pillar of our democracy. [**While liberals have mental breakdowns and sob on TikTok, I hope you 'll become a Babylon Bee subscriber and support what Elon Musk calls, **"**a future where comedy is legal. "**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5e14581625cc4552a60c2398aed1d186&_e=1zOXQ3P2W_9gMW43GMrmocjdFN35oYTP5AZyxKLHV3aXXJMGMtaqNLlJdGGnzoHIZzh1vUvr97IDPLIoiKCeT_ETG2aNDJd6KGEwkYlQxWiYgUSMI1sKL9J0zKtG64H4DOQyoZLzbHNvAt-ROS0Cmhyo1dusrKWz1s6lQi_8Bs8y633FkYww7XTNjhE6BkXP8Lzs4cv5Kvb8h_Qf5kAhy5c1-Ev1wzIKMddI5nur2M7QpAB6vo7cpvwuQgrX8tJnFZ2hhMIXJnC3x0dkkx5dRw%3D%3D)I'll leave you with this, a photo of two handsome men who love humor, the First Amendment, and America.

name: David Horowitz
subject: “Totally worth the read”
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America?
---
| |
---
Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America? Are you concerned that America’s history and values are under attack like never before? I am too. As you know, the radical Left lies and distorts the truth about our country... And these lies are threatening to undermine everything our nation once stood for... If they had it their way, the Left would have you believe America was founded as a “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery. But this plot to distort the truth is just a part of their agenda to destroy our country as we know it and rebuild it with their radical socialist ideology. That’s why I wrote my latest book, **_America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk created America and why the Left is Determined to Destroy Her._** ...Because I’m fed up with the Left and their disingenuous schemes, and I wanted to reveal the **_true_** history of America’s unique contribution to human freedom dating all the way back to our founding. name: Senator-elect Bernie Moreno
subject: I couldn’t have won without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Because of YOU, we have a new Republican majority. That’s why I want to hear your top priorities in 2025. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0owLrHYl_GyZKfbni8cnYIG3SQDJ54DLoUxRl3xfgc9BpWMrFaTjMXmIVUS1mCUoEBDlGSEuvVU_zMRpCmKQS8JbYq2nzzohIdOlb4c6YdW4Uc6MbRph4fSHOhf5TnecP2S7RJ3nMpfyrl-XeZimtTGTwcy1z5HbfNIVAD_HC3y-QM%3D)

Fellow Patriot - Let me introduce myself.

My name is Bernie Moreno. My win in Ohio officially clinched the Senate majority for Republicans!

_First, I want to thank you for everything you did to support my campaign for the U.S. Senate and for standing with my fellow Senate Republicans in taking back the Senate!_

We have built a majority that even the liberal media are admitting it would take Democrats [**at least two election cycles to defeat.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0owTa8JDPkNEyDY0EAWOyxIE-kH08eJaqs8q_BZkhqYsJXo9EFpOvSM6Ie3YdxrZk7PwyK5UR1GYRkM4gmM4yY9r3j93qLNRCW9O8OY7js3CGViZ1EYHum7y906hMJWYUka6I80RMA8TnxGW3aMhtmjWFj2Zsl7hcsTAMazW13q9kk%3D)

I'm proud to stand alongside President-elect Trump and my Senate GOP colleagues to fight for conservative principles and American values.

We have a lot of work to do to restore our country after the damage Joe Biden and Kamala Harris inflicted during their failed administration.

So, I've worked with the NRSC Polling Team to create this [**Top Issues Survey**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0ow9C0Y2ur7HSuIHpqSRvsncAAS3jYJF9QSm2wQCPViiGjezFt6aOmd5yhh6Um8qa26cDg9Ki_C1ZbEkXXACSfvSXNqp7m15SnLLCd94TD-8SrPx9_0xTMXSoQd3aypMgcFC38I-gskgYxnnFXpeHV0gn-w5_kEE-bZ6M1XtUr0ZDI%3D) which will only take a few moments to complete.

We hope to receive 700 survey responses to our**Top Issues Survey** before midnight tonight so that Senate Republicans can plan our agenda for this Congress.

We are making plans NOW that will impact what issues we act on FIRST when we take control of both houses of Congress and the White House in January.

[**Please take a few moments today to complete your Top Issues Survey.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0ow-jdT58onCyrOmF2Qk636FgpTZKCXrItlzf1B4o9v8rvuKFxvOJGgfRClDlgjmz_6LSMKeW-uBdmKYs_9Te6Bnml5hNkIaCML67MgOCtf9QqvbebbngABwk0AGS9UdqAPTAu3SLuz7CPOS5a7ikkB847M4Fc4F21s9IpiNctwxwk%3D) I am working with my Senate Republican colleagues to distribute this survey and others to the Republican supporters who helped us win.

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0owavWm0EVya-mKxQQUJzmyeNAJIYrgifu459Y8NOY3lM5XCvTcvV_10tGnejGdYCs89WdvyBYTRxj6DQEcSu0pugAtpB1bi3LY8H6jjF2MUbg1-8K9-_c1LK6_3G4m2SPwJzjMQqIH1k_y9X8DoWeBhEztb79rIwXDnEl06y6bZpU%3D)
We need to know what you think so we know how to best fight for conservative principles and American values as we take on the far-left Democrats.

We're seeking to collect 700 SURVEY RESPONSES before midnight tonight so our polling and data analytics team can review responses in the morning to pass along to Senate Republicans.

We are ready and eager to FIGHT for liberty and the American Dream as we rebuild America following Joe Biden's failed presidency.

[**Please complete your survey before you click away from this email.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0owsarfAYmAV79k3eutWAGiklAFMc1BvJorihsfYQQVZjD4zfZRceekMkfLaFjaxX-mxrpOPljxJqMW0xIaGu2DDYa2GJSIvFs9i7x1rxcAd8DMzy6bxf0VFpr1C2LCpmHBGKTuxtbCaC7JwywOzQRxIiyspB6RmqjtxmKN1b75gi0%3D)

Thank you,

Bernie Moreno
Senator-elect (R-OH)

[COMPLETE THE SURVEY ⇒](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=39761829266047e5aa8b73922d13586b&_e=LQxzRHES7Byra2nm8sC_ya88xh22luXF6OrQujYz1d8bUCUTfxEh8-Sk_yGiIHxFNI1XFPBuFRGa7Bhmxg-5ESvoJyHzvrcA3-BiSEPoeBuHFrn6-434iaWrmPrTO5Zy2r_O3CUwrppDR8pulNiVzwolqD5DGyzrrR0XcJ4_DSPB5LomEhrEQJY5TbtVBAp06G_Y4E-TSGX-fL5fqvLivWKXEW_isFHgxr3anAky5D38Bxv72Vkm0JBoUfij-o7KVcVwYBx3iEiDwzgwcmDAHaMhppjDtONFJKbWk3k4Tbjw66o5TiLaZ0OsGwSYs0owO13_r6uozNkLo2WX_3KxSvYNNzvK3LvFD-0-3Wkl4KvxONermeTHCxWfpFjysf-7DO6ciCKKmCsKOEMKm95NPIl8PCLJntJLMtkLfleda0a0VrnYKxgSBo-7kOEplAjaQnEc9kXtN11RAG_Y3Q1z4Gpodp3DiexA5abeix8JZ3U%3D)

If you want to help Republicans, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **He’s not only plotting to DESTROY all evidence against him, but PROSECUTE Jack Smith!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85171?t=6&akid=18097%2E878179%2EfLhAQh) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85171?t=7&akid=18097%2E878179%2EfLhAQh)

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My husband, Andy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people.
#
**I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.
**People like my husband, Andy.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241124-1?refcode=em20241124-1570&amount=5&refcode2=1570_21716_zL9MDt&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)
When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away.
I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky.
Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him.
Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.
My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities.
But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country.
That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate.
[**I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please pitch in $5.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241124-1?refcode=em20241124-1570&amount=5&refcode2=1570_21716_zL9MDt&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241124-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241124-1570&refcode2=1570_21716_zL9MDt&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241124-1&t=1&refcode2=1570_21716_zL9MDt&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1570%2E21716%2EzL9MDt)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Fellow American,

Donald Trump not only earned a sweeping electoral victory on
November 5th, he earned a mandate for change.

The scope of the victory - electoral swing state domination,
popular vote victory, and a Republican-controlled Senate -
represents a decisive rejection of the Biden-Harris
administration.

And President Donald Trump was just one of many RON
PAC-supported candidates who won their elections. We're proud to
have contributed to this year's victories, especially in some of
the tightest races, like Senator-Elect Dave McCormick.

Roughly 75% of Americans think the country is on the wrong
track. With this November's results, that is likely to change for
the better very soon-and we have patriots like you to thank.

LET'S KEEP WINNING

Thank you,

RON PAC

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’ve seized all my money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=206093b03d8547dfbdc31d98b3db82a9&_e=82Zu3Q-j_htmWiEhX26EASm3ixCuKuMENj8DSt-NZZtZZGYn0PgnQX_jsOJIIwMnT81RkCnoI7lpqhlAD_tae_dXlK2l8zhSuRS3wmxnJ71CNNWg00zJzLs3A9IVR2yjUrma_zrCKPMQdioWnrb_aNRx0AZJOyR1uWld2C6PVC2nACJvF-h6usR5J61QqPMczs4tgfgMTwu0Kixvl6jpn1hiZ0a3STTiSzClD9TrIYw8-SSqXtRF17EM9bYOYKDFx-pWocgGPtnnzQoNhYxuubgENeawBtaTS5FScd4z4eFPkKNpYVA9FesKhzd4frQPNG3Hb95LN6HlvJL7dLoGMTJ4nhCHWOraW_6HqNjQlJ4pQ-duOe16XTeVCyg9ZjcadDZUBy_uNf10RT8ZnUEIqfTd8hx4Decnkr-gA1QIvuXPhopmDKebdWaKVGpEd8v9)
---
Dear Peter,
---
Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account.
---
Imagine all of your money being seized.
---
__That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me.__
---
I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...
---
As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been __taken away__ from me!
---
But there’s one thing I want to make clear...
---
...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
_**That’s a LIE.**_
---
The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that.
---
And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story.
---
But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, because even after EVERYTHING the Left has done to me, I will _NEVER_ SURRENDER the fight for freedom and justice. **](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=206093b03d8547dfbdc31d98b3db82a9&_e=82Zu3Q-j_htmWiEhX26EASm3ixCuKuMENj8DSt-NZZtZZGYn0PgnQX_jsOJIIwMnT81RkCnoI7lpqhlAD_tae_dXlK2l8zhSuRS3wmxnJ71CNNWg00zJzLs3A9IVR2yjUrma_zrCKPMQdioWnrb_aNRx0AZJOyR1uWld2C6PVC2nACJvF-h6usR5J61QqPMczs4tgfgMTwu0Kixvl6jpn1hiZ0a3STTiSzClD9TrIYw8-SSqXtRF17EM9bYOYKDFx-pWocgGPtnnzQoNhYxuubgENeawBtaTS5FScd4z4eG8yGcgoIt0Ckq3tMXtPx-gS7cUBLLGaigRJ5RRX5DL1_kwfMV7simg6tuCeNXyNChCatoG0q6WSX-BAaxselt1DjhQGXDxyMJknHlLIk8zfge_VPo7MEtWSXZJL3wSeuIpkkX49-QcgR2fk3qiTEGm)

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Peter, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Friend, Over the past week, U.S. Senators and international leaders showed that the days of the Israeli apartheid government operating with impunity are ending. In the first-ever Congressional vote to block weapons sales to Israel, 19 Democratic Senators voted yes on Senator Bernie Sanders’ resolutions to block illegal weapons sales to Israel, standing up to intense lobbying from AIPAC, the Biden administration, and Democratic Senate Leader Chuck Schumer. This marks a significant break in the once-universal bipartisan U.S. support for Israel’s human rights violations. Although the U.S. again vetoed a ceasefire resolution at the United Nations this week, another international body stepped up: **The International Criminal Court finally issued arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity.** Biden’s administration and Republican lawmakers are now trying to undermine the ICC, but leaders in Canada and across Europe announced they will comply and arrest these war criminals if they step foot in their countries. **We have momentum, and we cannot stop now: We must keep trying various methods to end U.S. support for the Israeli genocide of Palestinians.** Earlier this month, Congresswoman Cori Bush and I led a Congressional letter to President Biden questioning his deployment of U.S. troops to the Middle East and the U.S. coordinating with Israeli forces including sharing intelligence. These actions violate the U.S. Constitution and the 1973 War Powers Resolution, which make clear that Presidents must get Congressional authorization before involving U.S. forces in war. [**Please add your name today to co-sign my Congressional letter to President Biden: Demand he stop violating our laws and our Constitution in his support for Israel’s growing regional war.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjIOBfsU4tc_0Rjh9uN_oPmQ_hx9YaToqi8reuXwppD_68PWKIllMMfZCWFNbK8LAdMEH8KNYl2VVx2NDWeCFisRIub3hrZHT3EIuT5xR3YUSs4pXWI76aGINps_uP6Se4XyR9o0lyfZAuqDlc7ZDchvGE-pg-Hpg1o9TFFRT-xEiBSPxbA5oVXb39t83ayz2Cv3aUa4hgwhCtmucN4H-OfS1IJuYUNYPR-pN8f-mrtrPdpUsSbX4z-mo70MF4tWUP64_dXw2dUJ9EqO4-jk_wP7f4Z4LldeVvKRkR8TVjpRqpsfJg6DnHelt8F1MVZpwxIMrWHtyeeHOvuANfGRdWtnVeHpnoDrCer8VgA0u_6hR_SZ8pqnkJadioJosBb2fYLunCjQD4dl05SqUjbmJ4ZFnzkrzJ7OnPQWDHzN04O58/4bq/QKdxUmuoQje--geGDTqWWQ/h1/h001.B4BERz3q5V4H2q75O0qnH1AOYBvKdWLdQRrINZchVDc) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjyw3QTygU9f4wWCwEVHjRX8Gv-Vkvt1EN8VPlagtLoOvx2OZRrUIPCiuCxL6zwPaUrLCefwoXr9bKZBXCy16kjxqrjxvFdeKPa3iA1QWhPxxbSnfWd3XE4nJD-K7REd5s9QzBANuXyiFUrrG0dPa72i4eZi6HhM6VGloQJxnz6EB6gBlgxhfOFEb-dumJGw7Vaj2j1UUxox1imnB5AhaaQ52_sofs6JumysURjJvKfz-3RVKm4XVSCmXXK2fqPxLjQuCPQPEVp_jC9dN3RDEBOiS1drUaX-CyuksG3IsyJDu0SpHLIa69r9aXOYbedahKsMoaGhWAue8JHgxTWCqPb1H3Phy5yYTn34vaUKeSpJ5G8rlrSBY7bC1mnG2yKWCZbUOIjSWuYCM5ZfLpfpD7nVmHK7pc7iYg6OKwP_kQ0jM/4bq/QKdxUmuoQje--geGDTqWWQ/h2/h001.PfSdd8Bzt4owfqqlFZD6rzC5BKxY2pVfnznOpi3OrVg)

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Nov 23, 2024
Subject: Sign on to my Congressional letter to Biden to end unauthorized U.S. involvement in Israel’s regional war.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week, the Biden administration:
* Lobbied members of Congress against the first-ever Congressional vote to block weapons sales to Israel. Despite this pressure, nearly half of all Democratic Senators (19) voted to uphold U.S. and international law, standing with the majority of Americans—and the majority of Jewish Americans—who want to cut off U.S. weapons to Israel.
* Vetoed a ceasefire resolution at the United Nations, for the fourth time since last October.
* Tried to undermine the International Criminal Court’s historic arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. This further isolates the U.S. from the international community: Leaders in Canada and multiple European countries have already affirmed that they’ll arrest Netanyahu and Gallant if these war criminals step foot in their countries.

We’re seeing historic steps from U.S. Senators and international leaders that show the tide is turning. **The days of the Israeli apartheid government operating with impunity are ending.**
We must keep pressuring the U.S. federal government to end our complicity in these violations of human rights and laws. We must stop arming and funding this genocide and stop shielding Israel from accountability. **We have other tools to pressure President Biden in these last months while he's still in office.**
My sister-in-service Rep. Cori Bush and I recently led a letter to President Biden to make clear that his actions—such as deploying U.S. troops to the region, intelligence sharing, and operational coordination with Israeli forces—require Congressional authorization. These unauthorized actions violate Article I of the U.S. Constitution and the War Powers Resolution of 1973. Congress can act to bring troops home and more.
[**Will you sign on to support our recent letter to President Biden, pushing for an end to U.S. involvement in genocide and Israel’s regional war?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-v4-yKgeScPwECjr-3C52u-ZSI0YD2oZLwndrwUDQpplIcV-45mOkAW_J_2Lkc0i8YOFanhC8uI-niU5BX8qTjDoZmnhozO3-lWAEievw0XHE6Czly8DPkpRQA9vmMliCnPjciEUpFAFv-sK_18uWmut5Kv4xDF5staRM7suP0bNA8j8IV6xRGGYCUX6BebHw9odiuArj1Y8j7Kx848fzH6yzTCuTP9bEFHxhQfJbcx2tfUpDmLcNYr7XjuR-iULbeQLv5nUZ1sDxFYR4S7fzZba_lo8y1D5tJy_t65gUz1lelmNAMioZAcNsKHPtGNShv27jvMZ0CSJPOomiZT8n8JEUppb5HKmoiS0DAQy4Dy4tttRpokLjTRSqcDTDCHoZw1kWb_nNharADVf5beTQXmNmc2wGfZZLHjK3agF5lEOvbi5Qbc3yrkvSRDDA9BruFypzRLvUoOJEt_Xs5w7ieAPTmZ6krGreCbFBWY1sq2JcmrzomFMeaD_2JirBK2TQ/4bq/QKdxUmuoQje--geGDTqWWQ/h3/h001.5JkcCC1h2AjlPZu6IiPQK1QMyriwzyGBK6NvEckCRes)

For decades, unconditional support for Israeli atrocities against Palestinians has been a shared bipartisan stance in the U.S., but our movement is bringing much-needed change. We must build on this momentum and continue pushing our federal government to uphold U.S. and international laws.
Last week, I spoke on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives about the Biden administration’s failure to act despite sending a letter giving Israel’s government 30 days to stop blocking aid into Gaza. That deadline has passed and although Israel’s government continues to block even more aid, the Biden administration announced it will do nothing.
As the Institute for Middle East Understanding wrote:_“The letter’s recognition that Israel has been blocking aid from entering Gaza over recent months itself is evidence that the U.S. should have suspended all weapons to Israel immediately, according to the law.”_ I explained on the House floor that U.S. law is very clear: No nation blocking U.S. humanitarian assistance can receive U.S. weapons.
**The Biden administration cannot pick and choose when they comply with our own laws** , including laws that restrict military assistance to countries violating human rights and laws that require Congressional authorization before involving U.S. Armed Forces in war.
[**Add your name today: Hold President Biden accountable for violating U.S. laws and our constitution by co-signing the Congressional letter that Rep. Rashida

clean_body: We have another tool to pressure President Biden to act. | | | Friend, Over the past week, U.S. Senators and international leaders showed that the days of the Israeli apartheid government operating with impunity are ending. In the first-ever Congressional vote to block weapons sales to Israel, 19 Democratic Senators voted yes on Senator Bernie Sanders’ resolutions to block illegal weapons sales to Israel, standing up to intense lobbying from AIPAC, the Biden administration, and Democratic Senate Leader Chuck Schumer. This marks a significant break in the once-universal bipartisan U.S. support for Israel’s human rights violations. Although the U.S. again vetoed a ceasefire resolution at the United Nations this week, another international body stepped up: The International Criminal Court finally issued arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. Biden’s administration and Republican lawmakers are now trying to undermine the ICC, but leaders in Canada and across Europe announced they will comply and arrest these war criminals if they step foot in their countries. We have momentum, and we cannot stop now: We must keep trying various methods to end U.S. support for the Israeli genocide of Palestinians. Earlier this month, Congresswoman Cori Bush and I led a Congressional letter to President Biden questioning his deployment of U.S. troops to the Middle East and the U.S. coordinating with Israeli forces including sharing intelligence. These actions violate the U.S. Constitution and the 1973 War Powers Resolution, which make clear that Presidents must get Congressional authorization before involving U.S. forces in war. | Thank you. Together, we will continue pressuring the U.S. federal government to end our complicity in Israel’s genocide and occupation of the Palestinian people. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Nov 23, 2024 Subject: Sign on to my Congressional letter to Biden to end unauthorized U.S. involvement in Israel’s regional war. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, the Biden administration: Lobbied members of Congress against the first-ever Congressional vote to block weapons sales to Israel. Despite this pressure, nearly half of all Democratic Senators (19) voted to uphold U.S. and international law, standing with the majority of Americans—and the majority of Jewish Americans—who want to cut off U.S. weapons to Israel. Vetoed a ceasefire resolution at the United Nations, for the fourth time since last October. Tried to undermine the International Criminal Court’s historic arrest warrants for Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and former Defense Minister Yoav Gallant for war crimes and crimes against humanity. This further isolates the U.S. from the international community: Leaders in Canada and multiple European countries have already affirmed that they’ll arrest Netanyahu and Gallant if these war criminals step foot in their countries. We’re seeing historic steps from U.S. Senators and international leaders that show the tide is turning. The days of the Israeli apartheid government operating with impunity are ending. We must keep pressuring the U.S. federal government to end our complicity in these violations of human rights and laws. We must stop arming and funding this genocide and stop shielding Israel from accountability. We have other tools to pressure President Biden in these last months while he's still in office. My sister-in-service Rep. Cori Bush and I recently led a letter to President Biden to make clear that his actions—such as deploying U.S. troops to the region, intelligence sharing, and operational coordination with Israeli forces—require Congressional authorization. These unauthorized actions violate Article I of the U.S. Constitution and the War Powers Resolution of 1973. Congress can act to bring troops home and more. For decades, unconditional support for Israeli atrocities against Palestinians has been a shared bipartisan stance in the U.S., but our movement is bringing much-needed change. We must build on this momentum and continue pushing our federal government to uphold U.S. and international laws. Last week, I spoke on the floor of the U.S. House of Representatives about the Biden administration’s failure to act despite sending a letter giving Israel’s government 30 days to stop blocking aid into Gaza. That deadline has passed and although Israel’s government continues to block even more aid, the Biden administration announced it will do nothing. As the Institute for Middle East Understanding wrote:“The letter’s recognition that Israel has been blocking aid from entering Gaza over recent months itself is evidence that the U.S. should have suspended all weapons to Israel immediately, according to the law.” I explained on the House floor that U.S. law is very clear: No nation blocking U.S. humanitarian assistance can receive U.S. weapons. The Biden administration cannot pick and choose when they comply with our own laws , including laws that restrict military assistance to countries violating human rights and laws that require Congressional authorization before involving U.S. Armed Forces in war. Thank you for continuing to take action toward our collective liberation. We will not stop. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . If you enjoy a cup of joe in the morning, or if you care about human rights, this post is for you. As the holiday season kicks off I want to make a pitch, and ask you to support a new coffee company I've launched with a few childhood friends called Grounds For Peace. Here's why. **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sCCIqdvRLcvsTiAj-NfnC41mpAh3aZgIr0Hih14CUlE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152054705)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ece9162-e909-4b25-b4c7-72fe0e0df920?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Why Launch Grounds For Peace?
We launched Grounds for Peace with two goals. One, to brew you the best cup of coffee possible. Two, to do so while supporting human rights causes we deeply care about. It's a win-win combination.
### What is Grounds For Peace?
Grounds for Peace is an American coffee roaster that sources coffee direct from producers around the world. We strive to bring you an authentic, vibrant, and soothing cup of coffee. You can be sure that the coffee you order is not pre-packaged burnt coffee from some mega-corporation. Instead, you'll find an aspiring small group of entrepreneurs trying to merge two of their loves--coffee and human rights.
### How Does Grounds For Peace Support Human Rights?
At least 10% of profits from every purchase is invested into human rights causes, because social responsibility is at the core of why we exist. This includes, but is not limited to, supporting Palestinians suffering genocide in Gaza, supporting South Sudanese civilians escaping civil war, fighting for Congolese resisting enslavement, and helping Ukrainians fleeing brutal war imposed upon them. We want out customers to know that not only are they supporting local economies by purchasing our coffee, they're also supporting just causes for human rights globally.
### How Does One Order Grounds For Peace Coffee?
Visit https://groundsforpeace.co/ or [click here to order your Grounds For Peace coffee](https://substack.com/redirect/8c561f41-28bc-4876-b176-64fb8450e035?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Give us a shot, and if you like what you taste, skip the burnt overpriced coffee at retail stores, become a regular Grounds For Peace subscriber, and save yourself money to boot.
[Order My Grounds For Peace Coffee](https://substack.com/redirect/8c561f41-28bc-4876-b176-64fb8450e035?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And if you're not a coffee drinker, a reminder that coffee still makes a great gift to the coffee lover in your life. Thank you for giving us a shot!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97597377/513953495/1675782920?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20241124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzhhNDI5ZS04NWFhLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4kcbODhFt6BOR5sG7PXj35pHEIbCIICr4tllrsO3kA=) Peter – It’s Derek Tran. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
