name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISllkiZzcdNc-81iouxde22ltIDoMcv-9fz0TB1MsUPiIyHXcg-a2M5BmGqv61cYGqauozhfUcV897Mh_av-5t0YIo8uYqo5ZBZTI0bVF6mmTmshfNhN3avicdI6ogRoQu824-0gID-YupeoH1y0ljjtzocJTPwR3QV319K96snTBA%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISlez7gLqB1tcarxCWsriRig2abYMT75eQx73ceT64XrfcFYHcxaT7tpDv5gIzInJoX3ntftxz3Z3MRTj90eLADPD1OECgrKXPryBUaSA-9lAH23ADS0F46YUUrPlmC6c_bjPbHaWxhhoRjPzpsA0iLyNOeNXBaVy0SKo1Kby95SCQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISkkbM7XVCCm7Kv7ACDNCjIHDDoDg2Sscz-SRuHswPnTtI4FWTo_vC9Hjfv1ccfYJIUljCtVlWfqdb8dLlsdQJFjD_t2qYqQQrgcD9vwRrPL_JazYB5Mw7G__uhtGcubxjHJitin45zhNiC9ZP76KT-klPQ5SyvkaSHheIbv08RKLQ%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISnR647wv4u8MXAnMe_86MpOG35gR0QpmjnRfoj-GS96-HjDU3jWOwOlYKzaJnx3-8EpjbAlipTYfCLk6_V36OvPBucIedW4AiAVsOF-Qmi_zkhDDC2RpgT2yNGItsBU1Ws3hyBVGKGFQWlY7ClJ5iTOW4kByAGu8UK5vN6PGVlTOA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISlcH5kJmOtx-jVPPVSPc8dxeDkd9ZvTId8OSWeuqcbP3vLTf_9UAVp8lLPQFtDFp04P8tbmNbiz-XQZf_5UtEdV0Rg5PpIs1cUu5SOLmoI0ROn6-SxvMfMEF1ghz3UTCM2qsC9smaR7U3sgaZDEO5RhflkrPgREQ67ic9G8UEA50w%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=10bf9b9407a04dc3ba5c2f10fbae8300&_e=o2jqZuoM9Mn8SRKTQ9v4729GqplCEA1veqV_Dx36AXuWWlaJw42sJHUxScNaBbbOcSOeXdqEKAr8MtphSJE9SqYO0lY9DcQjqzrY7d7F5PoLKh-xRhX8HqVfUGxvxa9-mvHzqvYlKtPPmnvCms44Qj-NSkg6K1TheMWwdI_PuLtw-kTnyDNZgptz6hl-Scyj7DqDbPSctHDUneHGskOpTLDloPqYrkMt4ygjkVmWISmENTnKAsTcynHTkq-PQHBUbPnSbXrNiRBkJjBI9zj3Vsp1jgT_zcMhImPkl1BkMtERlge1-jXYsUYK5YOrrY8LLRFovByYpQudhX9s0xLjfVY2wLeT0hvAH_QgiE0udTvoFJBAq73ufK_2frsUZ2JD6tz4Yu9IcDH1sDg237OUtw%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. Dear Fellow American, My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do. And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him. Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy. He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy. I was so proud that night. Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch. – but first, let me explain what happened. Our nightmare started in October of 2020. Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory. Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge. When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter. Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs. My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car. Then it happened. Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car. After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn... Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy. They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist. There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires. Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death. The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder. Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison. Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear. My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year! But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal. If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments. We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction. So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone: I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help. But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me. Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help. And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly. Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today. And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers. Gratefully, Patti Reilly P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click here to

Peter, though Georgia hasn’t been recognized by the rest of the world as a battleground state for long, Georgia Democrats continue to show the world that the Peach State is in play. Though the outcome of the presidential race wasn’t what we worked so hard for, we achieved Democratic gains in many swing and even deep-red counties – AND we increased Kamala Harris's vote total over President Biden's winning total in 2020 by more than 74,000 votes. That’s a bigger increase than every other battleground state combined! We know that progress is not a linear path and that movements like ours do not come and go overnight. Our movement is bigger than a single race or election cycle — it persists through both wins and losses, progress and setbacks. **This year’s election result is a setback, but it is not a defeat.** We entered the 2024 cycle as a new presidential battleground state, and we cemented our status as one for cycles to come. We know that there is hard work ahead to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026, and we’re ready to do that work. [It’s going to take a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to maximize Democratic momentum in Georgia ahead of the 2026 and 2028 elections, and building that coalition starts here and now. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, though Georgia hasn’t been recognized by the rest of the world as a battleground state for long, Georgia Democrats continue to show the world that the Peach State is in play. Though the outcome of the presidential race wasn’t what we worked so hard for, we achieved Democratic gains in many swing and even deep-red counties – AND we increased Kamala Harris's vote total over President Biden's winning total in 2020 by more than 74,000 votes. That’s a bigger increase than every other battleground state combined! We know that progress is not a linear path and that movements like ours do not come and go overnight. Our movement is bigger than a single race or election cycle — it persists through both wins and losses, progress and setbacks. This year’s election result is a setback, but it is not a defeat. We entered the 2024 cycle as a new presidential battleground state, and we cemented our status as one for cycles to come. name: JanePAC
subject: Trump won. Now what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We have two months.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97601032/513966142/1328794144?refcode=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YjZiNWUxLThjYWEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IUIWzCEr19mVHHna4RCKaEXZ1j2yaX3yU9ZOaT_kF6U=&emci=a18b9b22-00a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)
---
We already know what’s coming. Donald Trump’s fossil-fuel-first agenda threatens to undo _years_ of climate progress. From withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement and gutting clean energy subsidies to rolling back environmental justice programs, slashing protections for endangered species, and opening protected lands to drilling — he’s laid out a plan to supercharge Big Oil and flood our planet with pollution. But here’s the thing: We don’t have to make it easy for him. **President Biden and Democratic leaders across the country still have two months to act. Two months to pass protections, confirm qualified judicial nominees, strengthen policies, and create firewalls that make it harder for Trump and his allies to execute their dirty oil agenda. The more progress we lock in now, the harder it will be for them to roll it back later.** We’ve seen it before: Trump’s first presidency was tied up in lawsuits and delays because of the groundwork Democrats laid. With enough action now, we can make his climate rollback agenda a logistical nightmare. **[It’s time to act! We’re calling on President Biden and Democratic state leaders to do everything in their power to Trump-proof our climate in the next two months. Will you join us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97601033/513966143/1650841648?refcode=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YjZiNWUxLThjYWEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IUIWzCEr19mVHHna4RCKaEXZ1j2yaX3yU9ZOaT_kF6U=&emci=a18b9b22-00a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97601034/513966144/1650841648?refcode=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YjZiNWUxLThjYWEtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IUIWzCEr19mVHHna4RCKaEXZ1j2yaX3yU9ZOaT_kF6U=&emci=a18b9b22-00a9-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a8b6b5e1-8caa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)

Let’s put up a fight Trump won’t forget.
Team JanePAC

clean_body: We have two months. | We already know what’s coming. Donald Trump’s fossil-fuel-first agenda threatens to undo years of climate progress. From withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement and gutting clean energy subsidies to rolling back environmental justice programs, slashing protections for endangered species, and opening protected lands to drilling — he’s laid out a plan to supercharge Big Oil and flood our planet with pollution. But here’s the thing: We don’t have to make it easy for him. President Biden and Democratic leaders across the country still have two months to act. Two months to pass protections, confirm qualified judicial nominees, strengthen policies, and create firewalls that make it harder for Trump and his allies to execute their dirty oil agenda. The more progress we lock in now, the harder it will be for them to roll it back later. We’ve seen it before: Trump’s first presidency was tied up in lawsuits and delays because of the groundwork Democrats laid. With enough action now, we can make his climate rollback agenda a logistical nightmare. | Let’s put up a fight Trump won’t forget. Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

| | Dear Patriotic American,

Heritage needs your voice now more than ever. We're gathering insights from Americans like you to help guide our work with President Trump's team as we fight to restore our nation's values.

**Will you take a moment to share your views on key issues like border security, economic stability, and protecting our rights?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/trump-agenda-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=cacede399aa349f4b71012bcef78c51e&_e=pGAO-MmnCjTTjEZrvcy1yPjprPHDwkDkrZ8MqSIdWbhDYSq8xqCX_mVIDVmU5056TRDfC7SuL_2QbyCMnp8LljSKYJR6qu5vlIUz5Mynkwl7MmYJHelLIXXr2IGCLRgoOQ-dSLbb_dbKWC7uE6DCqxxZjaLPiFuc18exgbEOo4RmbydrUG6nfWmElf1H4bpD5KimQZOyCEwEhuC3XDkpqe814cPI3aviycFrm-YqaE95OpT5zq_BJ5BA75LtVxnhGtTD6jbvEW83TogEyuJkq535L8KwQNkM1yU0HJP8vxPfa_IUVxvNzclMUEUp59c-Nqdp3-jAPXsR6fzVFpJy_raopxiBx8eWKZfdPhhbcOlyR1cfNIW2jFhNJXoRyrZI)**

Your input will be a powerful tool in our mission to protect the American Dream. Thank you for your commitment.

Best,

Tony Johnson

name: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
I still have work to do to pay off my campaign debt.

|
---

[](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_24_24_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Nominated to Serve: A Bold Mission Ahead
EVERY DOLLAR BRINGS US CLOSER
Dear Peter,
I hope you share my excitement for what’s ahead: President Trump has nominated me to serve as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
For 19 years, I prayed daily for the chance to address the critical health challenges facing our nation, and this nomination is the answer to those prayers.
Now, I can finally put decades of experience and insight to work, rooting out corruption at HHS and ending corporations' stranglehold on our regulatory agencies. This is our opportunity to tackle the horrifying epidemic of chronic disease epidemic, especially those afflicting our children, and Make America Healthy Again.
**But I still have work to do to pay off my campaign debt, and I need your help.**
Our campaign faced unique challenges, including being unjustly denied Secret Service protection. This, coupled with other necessary expenses, left our campaign with $5.5 million in debt after Election Day.
[**Federal regulations prevent other campaigns or donors from covering this debt— _it’s up to us, the grassroots supporters, to finish this_.**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_24_24_nd1&n=5).
[Donate](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_24_24_nd1&n=6)
We’ve already made significant progress, but several million remain.
**I’m asking you personally to contribute what you can.** Once this debt is retired, I’ll be able to focus fully on the fight ahead: protecting the health and well-being of every American.
Thank you for standing with me. Let’s Make America Healthy Again!
| |
---
---
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
[Mahanow.org](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_reduction_v_11_24_24_nd1&n=7)

We know $5 might not seem like much – maybe a cup of coffee or a sweet treat – but $5 can seriously make a difference in this race. In a statewide race like ours in an “off-year,” we’re going to be the focus of national attention, and we need to be prepared.

It truly all adds up! It’s one person from Charlottesville, one person from Chesapeake, one person from Chesterfield... you get the point.

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLuMUkf6S5HXNhfXMkph20ztj2rn85OrCR92XNInWMyOBmNFvY-lmQ77gVZ4AObqmGJA3wM4MQCgbErMt0QuR53fOzc21lafc2iNXHWb4Ou3NtkMMykd7TnhQ4HNR4mbFeiyKcMnJk3Xjo9Y6DDqB74-qPJl5yq6KniK3vSh-VKjmw%3D%3D)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLtdbmgMmcvdcIgMVZ7cnlSiOXN2LWocnHLygIr9W7sqZf74MtVfzAfrNPnKSHz9kdQkXGhZPzM3tGgSAF1CvMddZvV14b1AV64LlEC6EQXqPQjvXNP1HkfA2Fq99-Y0LXsNMmq9wBTl3qrVkek6k4ml4KdGFOplXl2i1_6tEeyBAg%3D%3D)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLthR4rP6WdGZy40Xvggs-AQCsUP7mDUSANDujlFtRb7knzF1Bn69yyytLMl-_8FBlDVFDRb_sX_8wMRb27E1WOQQZkJ_Mp73ATD0fkuooW7nHu5RLhl9ENfQdjq3rnvfJDbenrlLDNL-_nMCBOLUWX04YpT8Ed9uyKUKxf-Z-kCrw%3D%3D)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLs5oPf4qgXRE9b6rrbXzENFZC6ztypMnl8ZgfTe3e1vBN3N6hdWnRQx333pk3ABR2Fqn9IgmRbVJSiaUD4QQBZCl0Ivd8CojVeNy_uM2l3W2fd-nNHqwOG0hm8uzKO36H3O6rmFISVFmG2feKmT-FaygSmBiiQP-PCE7ek12WvwaA%3D%3D)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLtfYzMmX3Zuq35uDXMGsCAZA5q3AxKxYI0mm-E0wUCep4tLAVma4Yi8jK604flpiJCKBgYMqDr7wq2qBx-qUzqyga8feMqnLhsEJ71AB3GZH5p6FfQPBInIEgw2Xd09rTdNNX4GzcHjkar6xyriJWBR2kPyJUVKDqkiKmE9h-kvbw%3D%3D)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLtRCJHkfHxuQIVmFTPdnSxsKBM2VpDns0Z4bubMQau-k7O6kAB-82zmqoqaIN0LqGKDmQqK4Q8rx7vpta8H5TguYT7UvQ-cRK1vQiQI5pZYbxbe-ZiiC7cw4wEGDTgw2UaVYB_4jPNP4cH4E6hMAiVKSr7IBD3ibigdXiUX0evOKw%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH14b5M5ailn7O8zDspdgqXS8egTx_kGwkyyvWrNyvat_oT86JsOyD2K2BYjxro2T8gSqmWcV5hd-ziQKZrQnC00ncMTM31l4rqvokVEgkUM0aLnpbzVKOzrKFQB-VOghBivEfwY8so6HHjO1AmoWKYuPbctD5DjuYiaOUUerrxSWIRID_Z4y-bpdV9d6uv0q7EvXbz7TKB_UYGrjk57cvDLsLICkWIU9XDAehmhZXCM1namKiCRpsukC-wD1pLFx3o96uo9zoIdstd3QNLipW-PGImRemiq9VsR_DqVXh2eghtcZbcBw0O4haCyzOj0pMFaedengQ8XB-u9RDzp5gthCwWVdb3bNpvrHNBf_TSHXVf4_bdcN_ZvCw75liYqHUDQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae34fe4aa43a4f708b5e30495b586603&_e=1_T4xt7yMiElg_is5elH1wmUZFaac3DM5VX74eFeqsLEUErI3dW2-ms-vt4xo3Z9R30Cf4APcR1G35oWxt2SIA1XdZosZRTfOgGf8F3dEVyKmM2ztx8Jnv10mHbZ3ju-tvmQ3hIT4HyOKA0cnjRMLLl4EclNOPzdnTOSMTmiILrHEbGofudLwAoUsohs5iO6VhBLeXJbkE5D4Ho-L25VsQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! It’s an honor to have you on our team

|

| | | **We are SO proud to have YOU on our team!**

There aren't enough words to describe the extraordinary impact you have had on the House Republicans team throughout the years. **That 's why we are OFFICIALLY recognizing your devotion with the prestigious Golden Gavel Award!**

Congratulations, Friend!

**This is Brandon Straka, founder of the #WalkAway Campaign.**

Our goal is to encourage people to **WALK AWAY** from the Democrat Party - and we have been **WILDLY** successful this year.

We've received feedback and testimonials from former Democrats all over the nation over the past couple of weeks, showing their appreciation for our movement.

**Michael J. Hout, a former Clinton Staffer, walked away from the Democrat Party and voted for Trump this year.**

Our grassroots movement is in part the reason for these stories that you hear everyday - however, the job is **NOT FINISHED.**

As a staunch supporter of our movement, can we count on you to help us keep up the momentum?

**Each passing day, support for the Democrats has been dwindling. **

We have the chance to put the knife in the coffin before January even starts.

We specifically are reaching out to YOU because you've been loyal to our cause.

**Chip in BELOW:**

Thank you,

Brandon Straka

clean_body: | | | This is Brandon Straka, founder of the #WalkAway Campaign. Our goal is to encourage people to WALK AWAY from the Democrat Party - and we have been WILDLY successful this year. We've received feedback and testimonials from former Democrats all over the nation over the past couple of weeks, showing their appreciation for our movement. Michael J. Hout, a former Clinton Staffer, walked away from the Democrat Party and voted for Trump this year. Our grassroots movement is in part the reason for these stories that you hear everyday - however, the job is NOT FINISHED. As a staunch supporter of our movement, can we count on you to help us keep up the momentum? Each passing day, support for the Democrats has been dwindling. We have the chance to put the knife in the coffin before January even starts. We specifically are reaching out to YOU because you've been loyal to our cause. Chip in BELOW: Thank you, Brandon Straka | | | | Paid for by #WalkAway Movement | | 441 N. Lee St. Suite 100, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Cool as a cucumber
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAk/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAk/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
I’m as cool as a cucumber.
You have to be when the Fake News is calling our MAGA Movement “evil” on national television.
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds.
I got real tired of seeing them lying about us with no repercussions whatsoever.
So I thought to myself, why not just go on their shows, dismantle their lies, and set the record straight _**one-on-one**_?
That’s exactly what I did. This whole election, I’ve been one of the few MAGA Congressman to destroy their narratives LIVE - all thanks to folks like yourself.
But I just went on MSNBC & what I heard made me realize we still have _**[so much work to do.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAk/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
They interrogated me, demanding to know if I thought that President-Elect Trump was too dangerous to be in the White House, then even hinted that he wasn’t qualified to be President.
**I kept my cool and picked their phony narratives apart piece by piece like clockwork.**
Problem is, they’ll keep trying to push this nonsense every single day until he’s inaugurated, and if no one challenges them, their lies could seriously get out of hand.
I know the election is over, but we have to remain on the offensive all the way through the inauguration, and it’s your generous support that keeps me in the fight.
_**[So please, can you chip into Fake News Offensive Fund today?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAk/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAl/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9uAl/?__vbtrk=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYxMzkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

|
---

|

Byron Donalds

Team, Trump hasn’t even taken office yet and his administration is already looking like a circus.
So far we have...
🥴 A Fox News reporter who paid a sexual assault survivor to keep quiet about her attack as Secretary of Defense...
🤡 A CLIMATE DENIER in charge of the Environmental Protection Agency...
🤦 A fake TV doctor leading the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services...
❎ And the richest man in the world and vocal opponent of free speech leading the new Department of Government Efficiency.
To make matters worse, the clown show is only just beginning. The damage Trump and his cabinet can do to our country is indescribable.
_That’s why it’s so important that we keep up our work getting young voters engaged with politics and empowering them to make a difference._
[We need this network of grassroots supporters now more than ever if we’re going to keep up the fight for our future. Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c31932aaeb3444a394e947d48bf514e4&_e=Sgy58v1NbTPelCDu8YpjdzKrdF_cvvjeKg66_HHxkwTBY3DcpHM2wp1ATrqCs2MHRwBy3XF6yYL6UZhQdX7n2VsM32_y0BDiEEk380XQSooVPIp7n48TFqfx5Be-rFSqq2NzZ5mgFeGBC1x9mOEQgTjYOKCBCMW0F4rTwdmupktVw_3GzvZ-3bybMFdFmVVX6gaSag0-b3aJurPknEkaVPxEiLscYKc2PbySooeUi-KTaMRQztuaFEGXGNr24y4ywqc9LNBMfk_un0IPjBFQlUl-Z8JptPs9HHDI6eNjAlaLACE-AT6EQH13Lh9TWLaUNjJ2x4AJKbVHJ320j9m4ssxrpk8gS2SVuYhqEM3SkSDSkUKRtKizEoR_z2GN4flsnp7pDm-sok8gShPiXB9sWYbKIaByY3uv69U1gteH4ZmW6s4GlEYDiBF8nvL_WrFHRoV9T8yvjRClqA78sZ0xenp8Zpp-RQLbCQaDpVcRaGB3ktbs55lZTf4RBBxdkV-x)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c31932aaeb3444a394e947d48bf514e4&_e=Sgy58v1NbTPelCDu8YpjdzKrdF_cvvjeKg66_HHxkwTBY3DcpHM2wp1ATrqCs2MHRwBy3XF6yYL6UZhQdX7n2VsM32_y0BDiEEk380XQSooVPIp7n48TFqfx5Be-rFSqq2NzZ5mgFeGBC1x9mOEQgTjYOKCBCMW0F4rTwdmupktVw_3GzvZ-3bybMFdFmVVX6gaSag0-b3aJurPknEkaVPxEiLscYKc2PbySooeUi-KTaMRQztuaFEGXGNr24y4ywqc9LNBMfk_un0IPjBFQlUl-Z8JptPs9HHDI6eNjAlaLACE-AT6EQH13Lh9TWLaUNjJ2x4AJKbVHJ320j9m4spcbhom46d4vVGCYXjKRly5idXgnqQfX0xGNBxvuBHJptDiXxeFzC4fhxMyqOLJn4ksjYWPtS3lWi-J5dzPWjHuMvz4Aw11g0h6ucK7yislwbeLeKmxu-WoisQSnmmlX878ftMNLV8lRQ55Xjb-cOxyzBf-2mb6wKkDUAu-LP5qM)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

clean_body: | | Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible! strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:#1 - Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race#2 - Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all#3 - Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring.Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here! Stephen Miller President, America First Legal | | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | This e-mail has been sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com, . America First Legal Foundation611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231Washington, DC 20003 |

As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.

However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.

Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. >From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone!

Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth.

[That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and UNITEDemocrats today as we build the strongest foundation possible. clean_body: | = Peter, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. >From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Abigail Spanberger and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: ** | = = = Thank you, Abigail | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a call to action, Peter

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97604699/513978282/2145040083?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=241124_team_AZupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGNhNzA1MS05ZmFhLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XNZoHcXag3VjZHqdqw9FdNr1KGQX4q0hG2eXKszz47o=)
---
Peter, Arizona will be a key battleground for years to come. **This year's election results are a call to action.** Some are devastating; Donald Trump won Arizona, and the GOP eked out wins in our closest House races — securing Republican control of the House for another two years. But other races fill us with hope. Ruben Gallego won AZ's open Senate seat, and voters made history by overwhelmingly approving a constitutional right to abortion. Peter, we can win the future we deserve here in Arizona. The closest House races came down to just a few thousand votes, and a strong majority of voters support reproductive rights, affordable housing, and an economy that works for everyone. **[So we're going to start working _right now_ to win up and down the ballot in 2026. Our future depends on it. Will you join us, Some are devastating; Donald Trump won Arizona, and the GOP eked out wins in our closest House races — securing Republican control of the House for another two years. But other races fill us with hope. Ruben Gallego won AZ's open Senate seat, and voters made history by overwhelmingly approving a constitutional right to abortion. Peter, we can win the future we deserve here in Arizona. The closest House races came down to just a few thousand votes, and a strong majority of voters support reproductive rights, affordable housing, and an economy that works for everyone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you so much, — Team Yassamin | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. subject: Trump's Victory Makes This AR-15 Priceless (Production Ends Jan 6)
body:

They said it couldn't be done.
The deep state. The media. The entire establishment.

By creating the most exclusive collector's rifle ever made.

Think about it:
You're not just getting the finest AR-15 ever crafted...
**You're securing a piece of American history. A symbol of the day America roared back.**

You'll have more than a story. You'll have the rifle that celebrated it:
[**_> > Click here to secure your MAGA Patriot AR-15 before January 6th_**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19183/6374453/1525e04160cb207eebde4c24c96919b6d67b679d/a6fff9b1e8d9567dcdc215f74104d036ab26fd04)

-GNU

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4ff598c42e7e41b7a6f3b027546eb736&_e=xkNP5J_cO9odE2CR7rZvBXM5ATaN3rgcw2ALf3VCnDqN9XZIJPGYpOczA3PO2l2tDAESieUnwD2m0wJSwhJmH0Qbgo9PUpc9Eyry6Sh8WirFrwUmJ6X8SqE88c3k4PKxff2mMCnkPsAnFyAVgOfmcc4nBlUkBjS_XBwrS4DEdbrg0RXy_KsdN6gaZw_1cmJm1JYIkgQKbGVaiJXntdtAgrBh8VBSZ2Vnmk0Nl3_9e1sPsGnPuO-HKSwlRk4HsG3CrGdrEJQxA1XmUOkyP4dQIFia37WHPxNk2nM22p2RAArYfBUlKIUfSgiOCUgIDcWPokL5p5dyx6BKp_iFykGQV026ZdT0u7az2nKQ89mBdoD4PCAQOpMa3wkpqMddK-BJZNUuTFm7SI2fWPH5rvRvFA%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4ff598c42e7e41b7a6f3b027546eb736&_e=xkNP5J_cO9odE2CR7rZvBXM5ATaN3rgcw2ALf3VCnDqN9XZIJPGYpOczA3PO2l2tDAESieUnwD2m0wJSwhJmH0Qbgo9PUpc9Eyry6Sh8WirFrwUmJ6X8SqE88c3k4PKxff2mMCnkPsAnFyAVgOfmcc4nBlUkBjS_XBwrS4DEdbrg0RXy_KsdN6gaZw_1cmJm1JYIkgQKbGVaiJXntdtAgrBh8VBSZ2Vnmk0Nl3_9e1sPsGnPuO-HKSwlRk4HsG3C8Jph1p6MLIdl_SYppB3weWq272NhBA4TneBd5-D0WV-vbp1Qau3bL4ZdhOA0Yzc3AkhdOVX2BkjLERd27AU27F97fV8Yi8U1vB9gzVFonQXQjhPCSZ6xn9XWPvBvFXON0wco63B_IN_mi4xD5FH-zQ%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4ff598c42e7e41b7a6f3b027546eb736&_e=xkNP5J_cO9odE2CR7rZvBXM5ATaN3rgcw2ALf3VCnDqN9XZIJPGYpOczA3PO2l2tDAESieUnwD2m0wJSwhJmH0Qbgo9PUpc9Eyry6Sh8WirFrwUmJ6X8SqE88c3k4PKxff2mMCnkPsAnFyAVgOfmcc4nBlUkBjS_XBwrS4DEdbrg0RXy_KsdN6gaZw_1cmJm1JYIkgQKbGVaiJXntdtAgrBh8VBSZ2Vnmk0Nl3_9e1sPsGnPuO-HKSwlRk4HsG3Cv_RaWekiR70Vz6-9gTljXlYjWmIL3TxuoiMRN7bmtD7LlTNC7gMj5dDkwzQfT6EweI2nsql7Cqx6SnnJQI-kFPQtx58z9opGVXU03Qpq4CDDgRS1VJSyvSIqGLtHFPhS-hPKF0Zoot5_KRBmj227yw%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4ff598c42e7e41b7a6f3b027546eb736&_e=xkNP5J_cO9odE2CR7rZvBXM5ATaN3rgcw2ALf3VCnDqN9XZIJPGYpOczA3PO2l2tDAESieUnwD2m0wJSwhJmH0Qbgo9PUpc9Eyry6Sh8WirFrwUmJ6X8SqE88c3k4PKxff2mMCnkPsAnFyAVgOfmcc4nBlUkBjS_XBwrS4DEdbrg0RXy_KsdN6gaZw_1cmJm1JYIkgQKbGVaiJXntdtAgrBh8VBSZ2Vnmk0Nl3_9e1sPsGnPuO-HKSwlRk4HsG3COvboh5nq-7mq3mxYHG0vWwBwxwzvEiAjVk0YNTEdjXLFTpG3MAmaATT9BquIi_S9e_mHfy6kZxTUn-2Ea3ETxj64TV8BtXMxdAmNV13o5kqTxyj-F8zKmlViNqT0caXmQ8U6CuxzOjQq14hmTVNQSg%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Season One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you** all ten episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a Founding Supporter. | | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron**Actor, Author, and Father | | | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

body:
We have just over a month to fix this
| Friend, Republicans are just over a month away from taking hold of their Republican trifecta — **_but there are just _22 spots left_ for local Democrats to save Social Security, and you still haven’t signed your name!?_**

We need the support of EVERY single Democrat to save Social Security, friend. _We’re sure this was a mistake, so here’s one more chance to take action:_ [**ACTION REQUIRED BEFORE 9PM: Don’t wait, click here ASAP to add your name to our petition to save Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20241124_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18098%2E878179%2Evug2tL) | [LIMITED SPOTS LEFT: SIGN ON NOW TO TELL CONGRESS TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20241124_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18098%2E878179%2Evug2tL)

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Peter, Kamala and Tim want to thank all of the grassroots supporters like you who volunteered your time, money, and energy to their campaign. That’s why on Tuesday, November 26th Kamala and Tim are hosting a call with supporters to say thank you and we want you to be there to hear from them yourself. [**So Peter, click here or the button below to RSVP to our Grassroots Call with Kamala and Tim. The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: Come share one last special moment this year with this incredible grassroots community. | | | Peter, Kamala and Tim want to thank all of the grassroots supporters like you who volunteered your time, money, and energy to their campaign. That’s why on Tuesday, November 26th Kamala and Tim are hosting a call with supporters to say thank you and we want you to be there to hear from them yourself. | | We’re looking forward to seeing you! Team Harris-Walz | | | |

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Our new Majority needs guidance. What issues matter MOST to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We took it ALL back! Now, we need to get to work. Please complete your Transition of Power survey TODAY to help our GOP leaders get to work on day one. | This won’t be a long email, Fellow American.

**_First_ - thank you for all your help with the campaign to take back the Senate. Without your help, we couldn’t have built this strong Republican majority.**

_Now, we need to ask for your help again, but we’re not asking for money today._

We need your help to let our GOP leaders know what issues matter MOST to the Republican voters who elected them to this new majority.

[**We’re counting on you to complete your official Transition of Power survey today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=741563a9311e402bbba9a26661dd9278&_e=rKpIPVGt9kUXa7LvfKvdHn492TnU2VhWUGhIiFp4ERDDVH234HeQp6zbIQNmg4pe6xVipSzBd3GaXF5hQP1mz49xapySKpLhMZ345btY5fRrXrzNpns3GsjfQa1l_ybc81YDHILoX6u2Jwl1P7yW5Vkfi50jBzQmHJIt95zUhHIXTj0dlPKQFx5jSf4pCgGO7k7Lv8XXadXUIVh_UcZUdDYfk5OK0KsRyO3orz26pp_79qb7jh4IvnSH9MojcaI5NSIDMVB0nKI6dxZxRhY0IoSJGEnYH5a0EUOwOPKWobf7yNekHvjGrxYgFEYUiLkcKNo-a5xydu08Ot-GMk9BehteY9q063aBfSbXDsbdAeLh4asAFyuR8-edK83mUw_kxcqc-JwWRsGzKvoQwvvO-ir59AKeWkmh0Nx5L_83ed94IL8XObpzestwuqJbIy9v3o9yWjXu1dJpFumhml0YXQ%3D%3D) _The survey has 14 questions that address the heart of our country's challenges and opportunities._

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

_P.S. We hope to collect at least 5,000 of these SURVEY DOCUMENTS by**midnight tonight** to provide us with a representative sample of GOP voters to report to our GOP Majority what their FIRST PRIORITIES should be._ [**Please complete your Transition of Power survey today to help inform our leaders about their legislative battles with the far-left Democrats. >>>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=741563a9311e402bbba9a26661dd9278&_e=rKpIPVGt9kUXa7LvfKvdHn492TnU2VhWUGhIiFp4ERDDVH234HeQp6zbIQNmg4pe6xVipSzBd3GaXF5hQP1mz49xapySKpLhMZ345btY5fRrXrzNpns3GsjfQa1l_ybc81YDHILoX6u2Jwl1P7yW5Vkfi50jBzQmHJIt95zUhHIXTj0dlPKQFx5jSf4pCgGO7k7Lv8XXadXUIVh_UcZUdDYfk5OK0KsRyO3orz26pp_79qb7jh4IvnSH9MojcaI5NSIDMVB0nKI6dxZxRhY0IoSJGEnYH5a0EUOwOPKWobf7yNekHvjGrxYgFEYUiLkccV9DCRuZJgA8SYc1fCVggGazeTYO_XxLNuz1ZYvb8RuQCnuWcdvMD51_ueKDM8P0r1pLLkol637bbkMf18ktnADy3OS3XmV-Vsqrd8kH2FPeL_Sa_wes8NLXJh7x2bng-XWojt_3zFQ7e8gc1JgjyA%3D%3D)

name: House Republican HQ
subject: WE LOVE YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Despite the vicious attempts to discredit him, to destroy his reputation, and to undermine his agenda, he remained steadfast in his commitment to the American people.
[SIGN THE LETTER]

|
---
| | | The attacks were relentless. The opposition was fierce. **But President Trump refused to back down.**

Despite the vicious attempts to discredit him, to destroy his reputation, and to undermine his agenda, he remained steadfast in his commitment to the American people.

And now, the American people have spoken, and President Trump will once again take the oath of office as President of the United States! 🎊

As a token of our appreciation for his unwavering dedication to our country, House Republicans are preparing a special thank you letter to President Trump.

_**[We invite you to join us in expressing our gratitude by signing this heartfelt note. Will you take a moment to say THANK YOU to President Trump?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4c3289d541d94053b9786f8ccf0f1b7d&_e=5AjqrTR7yCSz5ytWxdl9nAIwyU0Yd0-xg6Ql50Rye6t-xlr-z50Xf5xE_HXE-PpfUYYp7nh6y9yCkL-HHTadltOJaYHCh8d1r_DI_KNG9CWc1xVK6IS-Nvzs376qcIQpioMAHK7zImH40588hK-dq02OZ_t8Cm0s4MrvvhyVWm0AAqAhuClBsacG5QwAHHyHtu_FOKdPENqHk1WSbBtI8HUpN9Vm-F7PHwwHBEe4DpruoYLS0SHG30O1zg3qMExAqYA4x033H6JsYOyx9PsrnWtRa0kbJFZ815m7GPoSdg6GhteTFujDOnDXdIeBrNymQVnLq-0V0sTidTrz-SMhVqxjwOU4aMASz4w3DYaHD0XzZ5izZYUvdLuv5qHYPVGql-pi9KTBTrX-aqwp8ZckBg%3D%3D "We invite you to join us in expressing our gratitude by signing this heartfelt note. Will you take a moment to say THANK YOU to President Trump?")**_

---
**Dear President Trump,

God bless you!

After your historic victory, we wanted to send you this letter to make sure you feel our love, prayers, and gratitude.

So let us start by saying, from the bottom of our hearts, THANK YOU!

Thank you for always fighting for us and for giving a voice to everyday, hardworking Americans.

Thank you for standing up to the Radical Left lunatics that want to destroy our country and our America First movement.

And thank you for never surrendering, no matter what they threw at you.

We know that they were never really after you, they were after us- but you were standing in the way.

I hope you know that:

WE WILL NEVER STOP FIGHTING FOR YOU.

WE WILL NEVER STOP PRAYING FOR YOU.

AND WE WILL NEVER STOP LOVING YOU.

On this day, I hope you feel the love and prayers of the millions of patriotic Americans who will always have your back.

And I hope you know that our movement is more committed than ever to Making America Great Again.

They have tried before, and they will try again, but they will never stop our America First Movement.

Thank you, President Trump, for everything.

May God bless and keep you President Trump.

Sincerely,

[Peter](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4c3289d541d94053b9786f8ccf0f1b7d&_e=5AjqrTR7yCSz5ytWxdl9nAIwyU0Yd0-xg6Ql50Rye6t-xlr-z50Xf5xE_HXE-PpfUYYp7nh6y9yCkL-HHTadltOJaYHCh8d1r_DI_KNG9CWc1xVK6IS-Nvzs376qcIQpioMAHK7zImH40588hK-dq02OZ_t8Cm0s4MrvvhyVWm0AAqAhuClBsacG5QwAHHyHtu_FOKdPENqHk1WSbBtI8HUpN9Vm-F7PHwwHBEe4DpruoYLS0SHG30O1zg3qMExAue8Wkec1Ieh2DlXnp_GjATPEaHsY8mNij2KN9_P1FwHJaqWX-UfGQPw6u_9cPFGpVqh6j6bkzI4UktrnYKkujV8K2DpJWPvYqDLoPPfP5Ke9V1pnX3tG5t_saiUdThQt84klGXg7NPL-FdXCBKDe8Q%3D%3D "\[YOUR NAME HERE\]")**

body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in
Jail—Legal Analyst

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/fc7897898c8c7213/?utm_campaign=20241111&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING
– _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – I will
never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice.

And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over
like a dog and give up my rights:

_NEWSWEEK_: TRUMP ALLY RUDY GIULIANI 'ABOUT TO FIND HIMSELF' IN
JAIL—LEGAL ANALYST

Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think
Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_

Here’s what I said: _“MR. TRUMP DOESN’T HAVE TO HELP ME GET OUT
OF IT. ALL MR. TRUMP HAS TO DO IS STRAIGHTEN OUT THE LEGAL SYSTEM AND
WE’LL FIND OUT WHO THE REAL CRIMINALS ARE.”_

Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of
power. _They want me to pay $148 MILLION!_

It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m
a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.

But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have
hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be
fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.

Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical
Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and
an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!

_THAT’S WHY I WILL KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY GOD-GIVEN FREEDOMS AND
RIGHTS._

If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if
you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and
your family!

IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A
CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM
FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE
DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR LIFE.
