clean_body: Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst [] Dear Friend, Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car – I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice. And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights: NEWSWEEK: TRUMP ALLY RUDY GIULIANI 'ABOUT TO FIND HIMSELF' IN JAIL—LEGAL ANALYST Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, “Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?” Here’s what I said: “MR. TRUMP DOESN’T HAVE TO HELP ME GET OUT OF IT. ALL MR. TRUMP HAS TO DO IS STRAIGHTEN OUT THE LEGAL SYSTEM AND WE’LL FIND OUT WHO THE REAL CRIMINALS ARE.” Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. They want me to pay $148 MILLION! It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York. But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored. Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House! THAT’S WHY I WILL KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY GOD-GIVEN FREEDOMS AND RIGHTS. If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family! IF YOU CAN, AND, SERIOUSLY, ONLY IF YOU CAN, PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND – AS I KEEP FIGHTING FOR MY FREEDOM AND JUSTICE AS THE DEMOCRATS’ DEEP STATE TRIES TO JAIL ME FOR LIFE. [] [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [=] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] CONTRIBUTE $100 [] CONTRIBUTE $250 [] CONTRIBUTE $500 [] CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you and God bless you, [] Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: Your Voice Is Needed on President Trump’s Agenda
body:
America faces critical issues...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4d73d09b25df452586645ddd090319f9&_t=RuJkcllp81kXrfLSvywx5L4m7C9TCgjLEHBy6_fur0q5jN6ziFtwcU3dk47P-KVdEeHrujiC9IrjWRavYza-3Hyyu0Ru_jYzpc-LfATi3m8d1Ju6MwaEnzEFfGcamC4B)_

| | Dear Fellow American,

America faces critical issues, and we need to know where you stand. Your voice matters in this pivotal time, and The Heritage Foundation has launched a **National Survey on President Trump 's Agenda** to gather insights from dedicated patriots like you.

**[Will you take a few minutes to complete the survey?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4d73d09b25df452586645ddd090319f9&_e=WVHEu303T6uVtalgliqczhJQDlCn3yfKSQojmMNln-RFOHuqM7gbrMBq-4jYIjNNND8zGiV4_gEzb9_vxXXkx7CqbIoLRWT4IyYSIjdAqih9Y2rYziTy9xK84pBK52USAw8Ea62uDgNunFAr-013pTIwjho4xPGVbagylh63p_A0mjJgl7wQwrhs7aCQgL9sHq6QiYerOK-cP3mNLKGAmN8TVAESJgdXuh16Fv-ovZJmCDGkyip32-vx-fHfFwEowC-9hlVjvSkKKrXo9dKRo-HLMDtqClpSAAIRSKKadqBeVWOc-po-P6SR7zqr0D8LQDf3KtbTEaZWojL-4VBJ1b5pTEAJ-jeoDorkjDLsInN5BWxraORvn7TjQGDLwCJR) **

Your answers will help Heritage as we work closely with President Trump's team to secure our borders, defend our freedoms, and restore America's prosperity. This is a unique opportunity to ensure your views are heard and represented in the ongoing battle to protect our country's values.

Take the survey now to share your thoughts on key issues, like:
* Stopping illegal immigration and securing our southern border
* Ending inflation and lowering prices on essentials
* Strengthening America's energy production and manufacturing
* Reducing government overreach and defending our fundamental rights

Your input will guide our strategy as we fight to protect what we all hold dear. Don't miss this chance to make an impact on the future of our nation.

Take the survey now using this secure link: [**https://secured.heritage.org/trump-agenda-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4d73d09b25df452586645ddd090319f9&_e=WVHEu303T6uVtalgliqczhJQDlCn3yfKSQojmMNln-RFOHuqM7gbrMBq-4jYIjNNND8zGiV4_gEzb9_vxXXkx7CqbIoLRWT4IyYSIjdAqih9Y2rYziTy9xK84pBK52USAw8Ea62uDgNunFAr-013pTIwjho4xPGVbagylh63p_A0mjJgl7wQwrhs7aCQgL9sHq6QiYerOK-cP3mNLKGAmGmBTFhVIDBIZ7Y53KhRpAoBOv5kApwCyHkC-HOcmnotl4egQVf4tjvLVoSl1zJtazsgK2stfEY4numICYunSfThYqtq9H0i1CJRzIFifX1X4mCJpCH9seBHfNqcEbA3_1gdMRFKSe6ktP6u9oTicqDiqnnWGMLXd7ZhUnfE4uUH)

Thank you for your time and dedication to making America stronger.

Sincerely,

Tony Johnson

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Not a rubber stamp
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Their "reckoning" is exactly what we're trying to prevent, Team. The DOJ's Civil Rights division exists to defend voting rights, not to ignore it or rubber stamp Cleta Mitchell's brand of voter suppression.
Our shared movement to protect, defend, and expand our right to vote is going to be under an even greater threat moving forward. Pitch in $25 or more right now to make sure our voices are heard and our votes get to count >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
Folks -- when we say that the Department of Justice (DOJ), its Civil Rights Division, and efforts to defend the right to vote are under threat, this is exactly what we mean:
@CletaMitchell: Every lawyer in the Voting Section and likely in the Civil Rights Division needs to be terminated. They are not supportive of Pres Trump or MAGA. There has to be a reckoning. These are leftwing activists who have come from and should return to their leftwing organizations. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
That's Cleta Mitchell, a lead lawyer in the MAGA movement and a huge opponent of voting rights. She's led partisan groups as they organize "poll watchers" to challenge voters and try and turn them away, she's led lawsuits to restrict youth voting, and now she's advocating for the new administration to clear out our last line of federal defense to protect voting rights.
Attacking federal employees -- who protect our rights in a nonpartisan fashion -- is just the next step as opponents of voting rights try to remake our democracy in their image, where they get to pick and choose who gets to vote and whose voice doesn't count.
We've got to fight this, Team, and not stop until we win in court, in Congress, in state legislatures, and at the ballot box. Fuel our work to defend voting rights with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112424_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112424_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112424_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112424_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112424_1&amount=35]
Listen, we'll be blunt -- if the DOJ's Civil Rights division was filled with ultra-partisan activists, don't you think voting in America would look a lot different than it does?
Opponents of voting rights like Cleta Mitchell attack these civil servants because they know -- even as non-partisan workers -- that they stand between the vote suppressors and their total control over our elections.
Backed by dark money billionaires, inside-the-beltway "think tanks", and state legislators who drank the Kool-Aid or are fearful of MAGA reprisals, opponents of voting rights are tweaking state laws, replacing nonpartisan officials, taking judicial seats, and more. Stopping them is going to take all of us .
We need you to stand with us as we prepare for state legislative sessions in 2025 and whatever opponents of voting rights try to pull off at the federal level. Chip in with $25 or however much you can right now to protect our right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112424_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112424_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project

Portland, OR 97280

Friend, As the ballot counting process continues, _**we have to make sure every single voice in CA-45 is heard. **_ After all, that is the American Dream — making sure our democracy is representative of all of our beliefs, values, and voices. That is what my parents believed in when they came to America. It’s what I believed when I signed up to serve in the Army, and when I decided to run for this seat — and it’s the belief that is fueling my team now. [My team and I need your support to make sure democracy is upheld and that every lawful vote is counted. **It 's Nancy Mace, and I'm not backing down.**
The Radical Left, led by AOC, _is**losing their minds** over something as basic as **keeping NAKED MEN out of WOMEN 'S PRIVATE SPACES.**_
They're twisting the truth --_like they ALWAYS do._
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=132cdab717a04a8cb820338dff710608&_e=ScLuxw9RxtySR9KtZ1HVDPw1Tdi0FWGauRNTwxq1zaKoXGHt0dEfANoUPE68WCDQ4ADvWoszgWBdCnZuIVVO50x0MsTUhFrdjR2uPKLhZAgcKX1orFKYOgJDYGJszQKL8ZcqcpLrk4zLIkJppxmN0RnhcddOsU3GtWMuJ4fEoyhd-O3F6eO6dIVACxM4cSVP5NDM6dnBzl7-54r1km4-EJ5AVaHMme6igk2xeCAMOmlcFt69lvGcK7p43_Yfa0YdcJKepFRX51Fw63MkQfpa3pLjGjBwrV-d8lq5c_qaRuJ-ZH5Q9vs547neXv8tcA4WEy6pNScdf0Gn0BrxgMLWPfgex6b7jlrdSXkHw3nk7KQn520owt2LVe4xWoxEZZfvFiOgUUZTQb1w7weqXTUo5dLGxSUVjKMZY6FwuquFJYo%3D)
**AOC is RALLYING Americans AGAINST ME.**
She called my stance "GROSS" and said "EVERYONE SHOULD REJECT IT."
Let that sink in.
_**The Left thinks protecting girls is "GROSS." **_
**They want to throw open the doors of women 's bathrooms and locker rooms to men**, all in the name of their twisted agenda.
This isn't just absurd -- it's an attack on every woman and girl in America.
But I'm NOT backing down.
J.K. Rowling is with me. Speaker Mike Johnson is with me. **THOUSANDS of Americans are with me** -- men and women standing together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.
**And guess what? IT 'S WORKING.**
[A school board in Wisconsin just voted to BAN males from girls' restrooms and sports. ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=132cdab717a04a8cb820338dff710608&_e=ScLuxw9RxtySR9KtZ1HVDPw1Tdi0FWGauRNTwxq1zaKoXGHt0dEfANoUPE68WCDQ4ADvWoszgWBdCnZuIVVO50x0MsTUhFrdjR2uPKLhZAgcKX1orFKYOgJDYGJszQKL8ZcqcpLrk4zLIkJppxmN0RnhcddOsU3GtWMuJ4fEoyhd-O3F6eO6dIVACxM4cSVP5NDM6dnBzl7-54r1km4-EJ5AVaHMme6igk2xeCAMOmlcFt69lvGcK7p43_Yfa0YdcJKepFRX51Fw63MkQfpa3rh0BVsvB-_8EYJl9xNLYEZMZVVa0RsaUhV2afxWCvpgcJIDXUW_eFrBvSZGYvchRu7InKhN_tzqgVoJ3ILzfqZEx2q9qeEfZiQMHs-ij6GIwnIwDNLzvYlVboUAgk-nW78Sx-LUx5agCs2M0YcTK5A%3D)
**This is just the beginning.** America is waking up, and we're taking back our common sense.
But I need YOU with me to keep up this fight.
_**Peter, will you stand with me and[PROVE we have more Americans rallying behind us than AOC and her Radical Left mob?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=132cdab717a04a8cb820338dff710608&_e=ScLuxw9RxtySR9KtZ1HVDPw1Tdi0FWGauRNTwxq1zaKoXGHt0dEfANoUPE68WCDQ4ADvWoszgWBdCnZuIVVO50x0MsTUhFrdjR2uPKLhZAgcKX1orFKYOgJDYGJszQKL8ZcqcpLrk4zLIkJppxmN0RnhcddOsU3GtWMuJ4fEoyhd-O3F6eO6dIVACxM4cSVP5NDM6dnBzl7-54r1km4-EJ5AVaHMme6igk2xeCAMOmlcFt69lvGcK7p43_Yfa0YdcJKepFRX51Fw63MkQfpa3v1pOuxvZajQzejAZ62ggbv8qFKhSOQynYsu-MlM5BT0sfV_uNGN_rrX-rK_u24f83gRJ6-6_L-DzxxY_q8Y5LholtoOqZNisWI915U606Sqo5KlR98gnk7OPch4LVIIgWSbI6nOB2ymgoWcCUxkMNQ%3D)**_

I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race: We just took the lead, but only a few hundred votes separate us and our opponent. Victory is going to come down to counting every single vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you for standing by me, Derek | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2eb0fa96dbc04f9e9c9f169a7d5fcd6f&_e=mFJflvawOuqM8BxiOqK8zfjYIvY7EZSTzHC1_0XTnbMP7e4udFrQjXHYwuLyd7NeSp7zv-5E6Ys89xu9iDLyeq5dV0tg50QdAQ1L6ZiYqCwep-Zy_AOxwgqWLh03QDXdNPAEJBtFCzIXJTRyqwgHUyXnI8-kNX6SvzGx9JdHiLqnBOhaeUzzmge7cXQz-wxNUUkWHpmQBHKePik4SmgULzz1DdBnp_Af4qZ5wS6QUbsQuSdPLTiYxKqMK66jtxF6rAljU0bYQP27SMY9zdPlk0kOJawi8LRVlCD79lTdKfIRNNetw7WONrGwnlLhj8xpMYtII9UydSrZFDSnR9Q-gqr_EfYACVDaXK-5paRAi19Wx555NgJEKoc1QJxYgX8RD5SCk9oU-IuLQJslJjsxgw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2eb0fa96dbc04f9e9c9f169a7d5fcd6f&_e=mFJflvawOuqM8BxiOqK8zfjYIvY7EZSTzHC1_0XTnbMP7e4udFrQjXHYwuLyd7NeSp7zv-5E6Ys89xu9iDLyeq5dV0tg50QdAQ1L6ZiYqCwep-Zy_AOxwgqWLh03QDXdNPAEJBtFCzIXJTRyqwgHUyXnI8-kNX6SvzGx9JdHiLqnBOhaeUzzmge7cXQz-wxNUUkWHpmQBHKePik4SmgULzz1DdBnp_Af4qZ5wS6QUbsQuSdPLTiYxKqMK66jtxF6fSFNqpijvLIgV6yx6C2a7ZCTxU3JTw-U9gi6Zo0aaWiFp65alzE7tMcwDhYDXGedSzKS_2da7Ml3ZChjPC3XKl_ouMPYpjvniLwXMSEZzZyntP7gE5vdQoLu2KA2hRx_K0KE82j0CVggcaRq4rlYcw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2eb0fa96dbc04f9e9c9f169a7d5fcd6f&_e=mFJflvawOuqM8BxiOqK8zfjYIvY7EZSTzHC1_0XTnbMP7e4udFrQjXHYwuLyd7NeSp7zv-5E6Ys89xu9iDLyeq5dV0tg50QdAQ1L6ZiYqCwep-Zy_AOxwgqWLh03QDXdNPAEJBtFCzIXJTRyqwgHUyXnI8-kNX6SvzGx9JdHiLqnBOhaeUzzmge7cXQz-wxNUUkWHpmQBHKePik4SmgULzz1DdBnp_Af4qZ5wS6QUbsQuSdPLTiYxKqMK66jtxF6vxrNjmuwyJMv3W5GNQRns-wj_xzyZJblYLHMe_QnWZDdcsThAOvtheJS7Ol-AsRKOELhMndqCSChZYVm07XT9OA7zEV0m4gxd0KU5YTXq3xzBJpLNO9zD0rFJqm0ZJwnQ8Dtve1rWsrMG_O1cQ-9Ow%3D%3D)**

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b354b99195424565b6987a6b27f1c583&_e=_cfqufQM3C7SiE6CNScaOIiKAmhayYfEQpCKufKagFG0EEcB33HVIvvxULWIYJAHsT60W4R-cZORst-Oi9qs9v8zp3Z1J3CX8bJveIBbrpIhnpXf4Uarqh0rOWIsPmtKz-n1CxAutNapICd-L_DidBHm9jJcyH0Ev5iMCw9JvauNGTKln5FQTRQjZG-YDWjeRxJ3_oHLNWxabUSrWPb0lIYBxli35G4JRvy0Pk6qmQqP3cLyy6wusEySotrT-cG_mU6tx1up_7rBHOJUCb-MNSfzhBWUkIpUFOHJ70OuwqDkz457klvkh-SufRNxrhbUQ74-IbBBp6HGmPO14O5toUTCzMrGQmrtWkmmfFmYLiQUXHTXFG4tl86fboMK5bLGn8cw0U1p196aM-QJNcBYDve0Nkkimh76T8HJ25JjHn8%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b354b99195424565b6987a6b27f1c583&_e=_cfqufQM3C7SiE6CNScaOIiKAmhayYfEQpCKufKagFG0EEcB33HVIvvxULWIYJAHsT60W4R-cZORst-Oi9qs9v8zp3Z1J3CX8bJveIBbrpIhnpXf4Uarqh0rOWIsPmtKz-n1CxAutNapICd-L_DidBHm9jJcyH0Ev5iMCw9JvauNGTKln5FQTRQjZG-YDWjeRxJ3_oHLNWxabUSrWPb0lIYBxli35G4JRvy0Pk6qmQqP3cLyy6wusEySotrT-cG_9QWUE_Q3Gcu-Fzusx7V3HnfVxLuwTEBJ8l7Nh359xeca7lnVcu_FE4hi1n8mr71_oT1uiBBUTgTYniNMJ2CepdrYqs3WX3YA7Kgl_InZWPFqV228ncGhVDRF1gGQ76C3N8BxszZ6lFlAHl7h0HLXPBB7G5ZUsSEaYtwGsCDI42M%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b354b99195424565b6987a6b27f1c583&_e=_cfqufQM3C7SiE6CNScaOIiKAmhayYfEQpCKufKagFG0EEcB33HVIvvxULWIYJAHsT60W4R-cZORst-Oi9qs9v8zp3Z1J3CX8bJveIBbrpIhnpXf4Uarqh0rOWIsPmtKz-n1CxAutNapICd-L_DidBHm9jJcyH0Ev5iMCw9JvauNGTKln5FQTRQjZG-YDWjeRxJ3_oHLNWxabUSrWPb0lIYBxli35G4JRvy0Pk6qmQqP3cLyy6wusEySotrT-cG_zooukPpZVTqLEe6Ne-BsHbbLcczPp1lSJLhxk-ZXuHCId8oFg89Bz9Ezyj9YH8VrImEH2Y4zoG6_03n2I_lXWMZDwXqMrvAGPX_hhdVQVtCzTqunzzrc6z5a28MOgl0pKCq0e13h-qjTJqKeK4eNFtHMZuKwgQnn2svTz5i9NqU%3D)

Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,

Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, then they know nothing about me.And they know nothing about you , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new“First Amendment Fund” to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy. Every dollar given to this “First Amendment Fund” will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. It all started when Alvin Bragg indicted President Trump in New York. Then they bankrupted Rudy Giuliani. Threw Peter Navarro in jail. Arrested Pro-Life protestors. And sued me for defamation. Now, I’m facing hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud.The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the “First Amendment Fund” that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

Momentum for a Shadow Cabinet is growing, and with that comes the usual slop from far-right media spreading disinformation and fear.
_Breitbart_ ran a panicked piece whipping up opposition, and MAGA social influencers even went as far as accusing Wiley of "TREASON!"
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97606931/513986228/-1795141349?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY3Yjg2Ni1iYmFhLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_kvcHAodh2SKLdRB46ApsltEoklEWhZMlFpV1hiaJw=&emci=cb8d8788-80aa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e367b866-bbaa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880)
**Let's be really clear about this: A Shadow Cabinet isn't treason. It's patriotism.**
It's not about undermining the Trump Administration; it's about holding them accountable like our Founding Fathers intended. And it won't just talk about what we're against. It'll inform millions of Americans about the progress and solutions we're fighting for.
A Shadow Cabinet has worked in the United Kingdom and other democracies for generations, but it’s a brand new approach here in America. Like all big new ideas, it will only be possible if we see a groundswell of support.
[**Peter, please sign our petition calling for a Democratic Shadow Cabinet right now! It’s the fresh approach this moment requires, and we need your help to fight back against MAGA misinformation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97606932/513986229/-1795141349?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241124_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY3Yjg2Ni1iYmFhLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_kvcHAodh2SKLdRB46ApsltEoklEWhZMlFpV1hiaJw=&emci=cb8d8788-80aa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=e367b866-bbaa-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=28008880)

House Battlegrounds Remain Undecided**
We just witnessed a historic victory on Election Night, but our work is far from over. **[Must-win House Battleground races are still undecided across the country, and we can't afford to lose a single one.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d46411c25072499fbad27d3042a8f0a4&_e=igFVvA9PyNOIpdkU8am-qe0o1ClySNHxE0LjkC_NloAPf1bA20lWSKfkpVbuNh_WDQEKBK4cEUfBfQFjsLLWltiGg2wFMgk-0cy_HbFNMtXxCPSiqidcbSmPfHJ7Ioh8TDSpWepSjFfeFWGE4Y0ETQsTcDuDNMFM47MrvsvYcr7Q05sV1B7YeW_uLqNqt68EYFkOJDP1ZsEZLirsYktlvj3wFMAe6eF2FkD285G55MYJ4liHMVQCrMpyEUv384wfK3vU-kpT-zf4WtWOMLh3q2KS_RfcgUayPMWti1FTbQQW90WBj5t54TBEm3Fa4z7cvTyuatjdjSX1nzduIQkHEgi1PKKpdsN9l6WI_ELlRNd4U978JBF6ujESNJ4JYuXffnjbF1j67lkv5ws8iYg36ylbNDi37ObGW7bSoxssDBDia-hSJIV9kPhRJJWXhdIWQh9xi2fIVoqQiZEpjql6BWgWdQBl3fgtAKf-sOxMTBDOVOdPROhqH84Zm0doKN8Mk_Qiwm4RJtH9igqC-B-YFLwTrErwL9qca-sQFRUE6n7LT-LjnxD8run9HyYfuqW2sMfxMniaV4pYXeSRQrRXSpSU3HM_SgYCSNn_Qi3IJpJtYGQek5hFNzfPJLMrsuY5SB_vJxMR7CfhfhJ7KyfL-w%3D%3D)** Every legal vote (and only legal votes) must be counted accurately to ensure a fair outcome. As House Republicans, we're committed to fighting for every seat, no matter how small the margin. With a narrow majority in the House, every vote counts, and we need your support to ensure our candidates emerge victorious. **We can't let Democrats undermine our efforts and steal these critical seats.** We must stand strong and united to protect our conservative values and the future of America. |

Contributions to House GOP Battleground Fund, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. Contributions that exceed a donor’s contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a donor to exceed any applicable contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded. Any donor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Every legal vote (and only legal votes) must be counted accurately to ensure a fair outcome. As House Republicans, we're committed to fighting for every seat, no matter how small the margin. With a narrow majority in the House, every vote counts, and we need your support to ensure our candidates emerge victorious. We can't let Democrats undermine our efforts and steal these critical seats. We must stand strong and united to protect our conservative values and the future of America. | Official Donor File EMAIL: [[Email Protected]]() SUPPORTER ID: #0[Redacted] DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | DONATE $15 OR MORE to help House Republicans ensure that every legal vote (and only legal votes) is counted accurately. Your contribution will go directly towards supporting our candidates in these undecided races, guaranteeing that every vote is counted fairly and accurately. We can't do this without you, Fellow Conservative. Every dollar counts, and every voice matters. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thank you for your unwavering support. Contributions that exceed a donor’s contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a donor to exceed any applicable contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded. Any donor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
